Week.html.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Weekly Forecast View — ISG BPA</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@3.19.0/dist/tabler-icons.min.css">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg:          #f0f3fc;
      --surface:     #ffffff;
      --card:        #ffffff;
      --card-hi:     #eef1fc;
      --border:      #dde2f4;
      --border-hi:   #b4bde8;
      --text-1:      #0d1020;
      --text-2:      #5a6280;
      --text-3:      #9099be;
      --accent:      #3a6ef0;
      --accent-glow: rgba(58,110,240,0.12);
      --accent-dim:  rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --blue:        #3a6ef0;
      --blue-dim:    rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --green:       #16a34a;
      --green-dim:   rgba(22,163,74,0.09);
      --red:         #dc2626;
      --red-dim:     rgba(220,38,38,0.09);
      --amber:       #b45309;
      --amber-dim:   rgba(180,83,9,0.09);
      --purple:      #6d28d9;
      --nav-bg:      #ffffff;
      --nav-hover:   #eef1fc;
      --font-ui:     'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
      --font-mono:   'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html, body { height: 100%; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text-1);
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      overflow: hidden;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }
    /* Uniform theme transition across all structural surfaces */
    .left-panel, .right-panel, .dash-header, .home-status-bar,
    .home-hero, .tiles-section, .kpi-card, .visual-card, .tile,
    .accordion-header, .nav-link, .btn-icon, .btn-sm,
    .filter-dropdown-btn, .filter-dropdown-content, .filter-checkbox,
    .filter-header, .filter-search-input, .table-search,
    .data-table th, .data-table td, .channel-tab,
    .chip, .badge, .sev-btn, .export-btn, .reset-btn,
    .page-row, .home-banner, .home-hero::before {
      transition: background 0.3s, background-color 0.3s,
                  border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }

    /* ── VIEWS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #home-view      { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; }
    #dashboard-view { display: none; height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; }

    /* ── HOME: TOP STATUS BAR ──────────────────────────────── */
    .home-status-bar {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 9px 36px;
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pulse-dot {
      width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green); flex-shrink: 0;
      animation: pulse-ring 2.2s ease-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse-ring {
      0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,212,114,0.55); }
      70%  { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(34,212,114,0); }
      100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,212,114,0); }
    }
    .status-live { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .status-sep  { color: var(--border-hi); margin: 0 3px; }

    /* ── HOME: HERO ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .home-hero {
      position: relative; padding: 60px 36px 48px;
      overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .home-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(76,126,248,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 28px 28px;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .home-hero::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: -100px; right: -100px;
      width: 520px; height: 520px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(76,126,248,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .home-hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 700px; }
    .home-eyebrow {
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    }
    .home-eyebrow::before {
      content: ''; display: block;
      width: 22px; height: 2px;
      background: var(--accent); border-radius: 2px;
    }
    .home-title {
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.05;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--text-1);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .home-title-sub {
      font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.2vw, 1.7rem);
      font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-2);
      letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .home-desc {
      font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-2);
      line-height: 1.75; max-width: 540px;
    }
    .home-logo { position: absolute; top: 28px; right: 36px; z-index: 1; }

    /* ── HOME: MODULE TILES ────────────────────────────────── */
    .tiles-section { padding: 0 36px 48px; }
    .tiles-label {
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-3); margin-bottom: 14px; padding-top: 4px;
    }
    .tiles-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(270px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .tile {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 20px;
      cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .tile::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), transparent);
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }
    .tile:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
    .tile:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
    .tile-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .tile-icon {
      width: 40px; height: 40px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.18);
      border-radius: 10px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 18px; color: var(--accent);
    }
    .tile-arrow { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 16px; transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; }
    .tile:hover .tile-arrow { color: var(--accent); transform: translate(2px,-2px); }
    .tile-title { font-size: 0.97rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .tile-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-2); line-height: 1.6; }
    .tile-stat {
      margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3);
    }
    .tile-stat span { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; }

    /* ── DASHBOARD HEADER ──────────────────────────────────── */
    .dash-header {
      height: 54px; background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0 16px; flex-shrink: 0; gap: 12px;
    }
    .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-width: 0; }
    .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .header-brand { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-1); white-space: nowrap; }
    .breadcrumb { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-2); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .breadcrumb span { cursor: pointer; }
    .breadcrumb span:hover { color: var(--accent); }
    .breadcrumb .sep { color: var(--border-hi); }
    .header-stamp { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    .ctx-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
      padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.2);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn-icon {
      width: 32px; height: 32px; background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid transparent; color: var(--text-2);
      cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-icon:hover { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); color: var(--text-1); }
    .btn-sm {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-2); cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px;
      padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-sm:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── LAYOUT ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .dash-body { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; }

    /* ── LEFT NAV ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .left-panel {
      width: 220px; background: var(--nav-bg);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      transition: width 0.25s ease; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .left-panel.collapsed { width: 0; border: none; }
    .accordion-header {
      padding: 14px 16px; cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-3); white-space: nowrap;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .accordion-header:hover { color: var(--text-2); }
    .accordion-content { display: none; padding: 6px 0; }
    .accordion-content.active { display: block; }
    .nav-link {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 9px 16px; color: var(--text-2);
      text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px;
      cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;
      border-left: 2px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .nav-link:hover { color: var(--text-1); background: var(--nav-hover); }
    .nav-link.active { color: var(--text-1); background: var(--nav-hover); border-left-color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── MAIN CONTENT ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .main-content {
      flex: 1; padding: 18px 22px;
      overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; min-width: 0;
    }

    /* Filter chips */
    .filter-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .chip {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.3);
      border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px 3px 8px;
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--accent);
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .chip:hover { background: var(--red-dim); border-color: var(--red); color: var(--red); }

    /* Channel tabs */
    .channel-tabs {
      display: flex; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 18px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .channel-tab {
      padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-2);
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .channel-tab.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }
    .channel-tab:hover { color: var(--text-1); }

    /* Sections */
    .module-section { display: none; }
    .module-section.active { display: block; }
    .page-section { display: none; }
    .page-section.active { display: block; animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease; }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(5px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

    /* ── KPI CARDS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .kpi-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .kpi-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px 18px 14px;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .kpi-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .kpi-card::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute;
      bottom: 0; left: 18px; right: 18px; height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), transparent);
      opacity: 0.2;
    }
    .kpi-label {
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-2); margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .kpi-value {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text-1); line-height: 1;
    }
    .kpi-sub {
      font-size: 11px; margin-top: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--text-2);
    }

    /* ── CHART CARDS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .visual-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .visual-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 18px;
      min-height: 280px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    }
    .visual-title {
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-1);
      margin-bottom: 14px; padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    }
    .chart-toggle { display: flex; gap: 4px; }
    .chart-toggle-btn {
      background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-2); font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 9px;
      border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .chart-toggle-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
    .chart-toggle-btn.active { background: var(--accent-dim); border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; }

    /* ── TABLES ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .table-wrap { overflow: auto; flex: 1; }
    table.data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px; }
    .data-table th {
      background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-2);
      padding: 9px 12px; text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); white-space: nowrap;
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1;
      cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .data-table th:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
    .data-table th .sort-icon { margin-left: 4px; opacity: 0.4; font-size: 10px; }
    .data-table th.sort-asc .sort-icon::before { content: '▲'; opacity: 1; }
    .data-table th.sort-desc .sort-icon::before { content: '▼'; opacity: 1; }
    .data-table td {
      padding: 9px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      white-space: nowrap; color: var(--text-1);
    }
    .data-table tr:hover td { background: var(--card-hi); }
    .data-table .row-num {
      color: var(--text-3); font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px; text-align: right; padding-right: 12px;
    }
    .table-toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .table-search {
      padding: 8px 14px; background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--text-1); font-size: 12px; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      outline: none; min-width: 240px; transition: border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .table-search:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .table-search::placeholder { color: var(--text-3); }
    .row-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2); margin-left: auto; font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    .export-btns { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .export-btn {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 7px;
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .export-btn.csv  { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); border-color: rgba(34,212,114,0.3); }
    .export-btn.csv:hover  { background: var(--green); color: #000; }
    .export-btn.excel { background: var(--accent-dim); color: var(--accent); border-color: rgba(76,126,248,0.3); }
    .export-btn.excel:hover { background: var(--accent); color: white; }

    /* ── RIGHT PANEL ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .right-panel {
      width: 258px; background: var(--surface);
      border-left: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      transition: width 0.25s ease; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .right-panel.collapsed { width: 0; border: none; }
    .filter-header {
      padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-2);
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .filter-search-box { padding: 10px 12px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .filter-search-input {
      width: 100%; padding: 7px 12px;
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text-1);
      font-family: var(--font-ui); outline: none; font-size: 12px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-search-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .filter-list { overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding: 4px 12px 8px; }
    .filter-footer { padding: 10px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .reset-btn {
      width: 100%; padding: 8px;
      background: var(--red-dim); border: 1px solid rgba(240,96,96,0.3);
      border-radius: 7px; color: var(--red); cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .reset-btn:hover { background: var(--red); color: white; }
    .filter-dropdown { margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .filter-dropdown-btn {
      width: 100%; text-align: left; background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 7px;
      color: var(--text-1); cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-dropdown-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .filter-dropdown-content {
      display: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: none;
      background: var(--card); padding: 8px; border-radius: 0 0 7px 7px;
      max-height: 140px; overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .filter-dropdown-content.open { display: block; }
    .filter-checkbox {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 5px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-2);
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-checkbox:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
    .filter-checkbox input { cursor: pointer; accent-color: var(--accent); }
    .inner-search {
      width: 100%; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 6px;
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-1); border-radius: 4px; outline: none; font-family: var(--font-ui);
    }

    /* ── BADGES ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .badge-high   { background: var(--red-dim);   color: var(--red); }
    .badge-good   { background: var(--green-dim);  color: var(--green); }
    .badge-med    { background: var(--amber-dim);  color: var(--amber); }
    .badge-accent { background: var(--accent-dim); color: var(--accent); }

    /* Severity filter */
    .severity-filter { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .sev-btn {
      padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .sev-btn.all    { border-color: var(--border); color: var(--text-2); background: transparent; }
    .sev-btn.all.active  { background: var(--card); color: var(--text-1); border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .sev-btn.high   { border-color: rgba(240,96,96,0.4); color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); }
    .sev-btn.high.active { background: var(--red); color: white; }
    .sev-btn.medium { border-color: rgba(240,168,48,0.4); color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .sev-btn.medium.active { background: var(--amber); color: white; }
    .sev-btn.low    { border-color: rgba(34,212,114,0.4); color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .sev-btn.low.active   { background: var(--green); color: #000; }

    /* Sticky col */
    .sticky-col { position: sticky; left: 0; background: var(--card); z-index: 1; }
    .data-table tr:hover .sticky-col { background: var(--card-hi); }

    /* Scrollbars */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; height: 5px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 3px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--border-hi); }

    hr.rule { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 4px 0; }

    /* ── Demand Profiling 4-Quadrant Matrix ── */
    .dp-matrix-wrap { display:flex; gap:0; margin:16px 0 10px; }
    .dp-y-label {
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end;
      gap:4px; padding:0 10px 38px 0; min-width:38px;
    }
    .dp-y-arrow { font-size:20px; color:var(--text-2); line-height:1; }
    .dp-y-text {
      writing-mode:vertical-rl; transform:rotate(180deg);
      font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-2); letter-spacing:0.04em;
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .dp-y-50pct {
      font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3);
      border-top:2px dashed var(--border-hi); padding-top:5px; margin-top:6px;
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .dp-matrix-body { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
    .dp-quadrant-grid {
      display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:10px;
      border-left:2px solid var(--text-2); border-bottom:2px solid var(--text-2);
      padding:4px 4px 0 10px;
    }
    .dp-x-axis-row {
      display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
      padding:7px 0 0 10px;
    }
    .dp-x-50pct { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3); }
    .dp-x-arrow  { font-size:18px; color:var(--text-2); line-height:1; }
    .dp-x-text   { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-2); letter-spacing:0.04em; }

    .dp-quad {
      background:var(--surface); border-radius:8px; padding:10px 12px 10px;
      border:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    }
    .dp-quad-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .dp-quad-canvas { flex:1; min-height:190px; position:relative; }
    .dp-trend-canvas-wrap { position:relative; height:260px; }

    .dp-quad-consistent  { border-top:3px solid #16a34a; }
    .dp-quad-erratic     { border-top:3px solid #d97706; }
    .dp-quad-intermittent{ border-top:3px solid #2563eb; }
    .dp-quad-lumpy       { border-top:3px solid #db2777; }

    .dp-quad-consistent  .dp-quad-title { color:#16a34a; }
    .dp-quad-erratic     .dp-quad-title { color:#d97706; }
    .dp-quad-intermittent .dp-quad-title{ color:#2563eb; }
    .dp-quad-lumpy       .dp-quad-title { color:#db2777; }

    .dp-legend-box {
      background:var(--card-hi); border:1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius:8px; padding:10px 16px;
    }
    .dp-legend-row { display:flex; gap:16px; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .dp-legend-row:last-child { margin-bottom:0; }
    .dp-legend-item {
      flex:1; font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.5;
      display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:7px;
    }
    .dp-legend-dot {
      width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%;
      display:inline-block; margin-top:3px; flex-shrink:0;
    }

    /* CV info button & tooltip */
    /* Forecast Trend — right-panel stat tiles */
    .ft-stats-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; margin-top:12px; }
    .ft-stat-tile {
      background:var(--card-hi); border-radius:8px; padding:10px 12px;
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px;
    }
    .ft-stat-tile-label {
      font-size:10px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-3);
      text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.07em;
    }
    .ft-stat-tile-value {
      font-size:20px; font-weight:700;
      font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--text-1); line-height:1.1;
    }
    .ft-stat-tile-sub { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:1px; }
    .ft-error-legend {
      display:flex; gap:12px; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--text-3);
      margin-bottom:6px; align-items:center;
    }
    .ft-error-legend-dot {
      display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px;
      border-radius:2px; vertical-align:middle; margin-right:3px;
    }

    /* LOB Weekly chart */
    .lob-metric-toggle { display:flex; gap:4px; flex-shrink:0; }
    .lob-metric-btn {
      padding:3px 10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600;
      border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:6px;
      background:transparent; color:var(--text-2); cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.15s;
    }
    .lob-metric-btn.active { background:var(--accent); border-color:var(--accent); color:#fff; }
    .lob-metric-btn:hover:not(.active) { border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); }
    .ft-metric-toggle { display:flex; gap:4px; flex-shrink:0; }
    .ft-metric-btn {
      padding:3px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600;
      border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:6px;
      background:transparent; color:var(--text-2); cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.15s;
    }
    .ft-metric-btn.active { background:var(--accent); border-color:var(--accent); color:#fff; }
    .ft-metric-btn:hover:not(.active) { border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); }
    .lob-legend { display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:6px; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--text-2); align-items:center; }
    .lob-dot { display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; margin-right:3px; vertical-align:middle; }

    .cv-info-btn {
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
      width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%;
      border:1.5px solid var(--accent); background:transparent;
      color:var(--accent); font-size:10px; font-weight:700;
      font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;
      cursor:pointer; padding:0; line-height:1;
      vertical-align:middle; margin-left:5px;
      transition:background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
    }
    .cv-info-btn:hover { background:var(--accent); color:#fff; }
    .cv-tooltip-wrap { position:relative; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; }
    .cv-tooltip-box {
      position:absolute; bottom:calc(100% + 10px); left:50%;
      transform:translateX(-50%);
      background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border-hi);
      border-radius:10px; padding:14px 16px;
      box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
      width:300px; z-index:400;
      font-size:12px; line-height:1.65; color:var(--text-1);
    }
    .cv-tooltip-box::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; top:100%; left:50%;
      transform:translateX(-50%);
      border:7px solid transparent;
      border-top-color:var(--border-hi);
    }
    .cv-tooltip-title {
      font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-1); margin-bottom:6px;
    }
    .cv-tooltip-formula {
      background:var(--card-hi); border-radius:6px;
      padding:5px 10px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
      font-size:11.5px; color:var(--accent); margin:6px 0;
      text-align:center; letter-spacing:0.02em;
    }
    .cv-tooltip-rules { padding-left:0; margin:7px 0 0; list-style:none; }
    .cv-tooltip-rules li { padding:2px 0; font-size:11.5px; }
    .cv-tooltip-rules li::before { content:'• '; color:var(--accent); font-weight:700; }

    /* Demand Trends Section */
    .dp-trends-section { margin-top:24px; }
    .dp-trends-header { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; margin-bottom:14px; }
    .dp-trends-title { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-1); }
    .dp-trends-sub { font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-3); }
    .dp-trends-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }
    .dp-trend-card {
      background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius:10px; padding:12px 14px 6px;
    }
    .dp-trend-card-header {
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:2px;
    }
    .dp-trend-label { font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-1); }
    .dp-trend-badge {
      font-size:10px; font-weight:700; padding:2px 8px;
      border-radius:100px; letter-spacing:0.05em;
    }
    .dp-trend-badge-yoy { background:#fef3c7; color:#b45309; }
    .dp-trend-badge-qoq { background:#ecfeff; color:#0e7490; }
    .dp-trend-legend {
      display:flex; gap:12px; margin-bottom:2px;
      font-size:10.5px; color:var(--text-3);
    }
    .dp-trend-legend-dot {
      display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px;
      border-radius:50%; margin-right:4px; vertical-align:middle;
    }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══════════════════════════ HOME ══════════════════════════ -->
<div id="home-view">
  <div class="home-status-bar">
    <div class="pulse-dot"></div>
    <span class="status-live">Live</span>
    <span class="status-sep">·</span>
    <span id="home-refresh-stamp"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="home-hero">
    <div class="home-hero-inner">
      <p class="home-eyebrow">Aligned Automation Services  ·  ISG</p>
      <h1 class="home-title">Business Planning<br>and Analytics</h1>
      <p class="home-title-sub">Demand Intelligence Platform</p>
      <p class="home-desc">Integrated demand forecasting, scenario analysis, and partner performance intelligence across AMER · EMEA · APJ.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="home-logo">
      <img src="D:\OneDrive - Aligned Automation Services Private Limited\Documents\simulations\Aligned logo.png" alt="Aligned Automation" style="height:34px;"
        onerror="this.outerHTML='<span style=\'color:var(--text-2);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;\'>Aligned Automation</span>'">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tiles-section">
    <p class="tiles-label">Modules</p>
    <div class="tiles-grid">
      <div class="tile" onclick="openDashboard('forecast-accuracy')">
        <div class="tile-head">
          <div class="tile-icon"><i class="ti ti-target"></i></div>
          <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right tile-arrow"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tile-title">Forecast Accuracy</div>
        <div class="tile-desc">Tech ASU, Work Orders, and Service Request forecast performance across regions and partners.</div>
        <div class="tile-stat">3 views  ·  <span>ASU · WO · SR</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tile" onclick="openDashboard('demand-profiling')">
        <div class="tile-head">
          <div class="tile-icon"><i class="ti ti-chart-line"></i></div>
          <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right tile-arrow"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tile-title">Actuals Profiling</div>
        <div class="tile-desc">ISG demand actuals vs forecast across regions — QoQ, MoM, and WoW trend breakdowns.</div>
        <div class="tile-stat">1 view  ·  <span>Overall · Region · Trend</span></div>
      </div>


      <div class="tile" onclick="openDashboard('data-raw')">
        <div class="tile-head">
          <div class="tile-icon"><i class="ti ti-table"></i></div>
          <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right tile-arrow"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tile-title">Data Management</div>
        <div class="tile-desc">Full data matrix across all regions, partners, queues, and fiscal periods with CSV/Excel export.</div>
        <div class="tile-stat">150 records  ·  <span>Exportable</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tile" onclick="openDashboard('whatif')">
        <div class="tile-head">
          <div class="tile-icon" style="background:rgba(157,120,240,0.1);border-color:rgba(157,120,240,0.2);color:var(--purple);"><i class="ti ti-adjustments-horizontal"></i></div>
          <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right tile-arrow"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tile-title">What-If Simulation</div>
        <div class="tile-desc">Slider-driven scenario explorer — model renewal rates, contract growth, and dispatch conversion to forecast ASU, SR, and revenue outcomes.</div>
        <div class="tile-stat">New Contract Growth  ·  <span style="color:var(--purple);">APOS Renewal</span></div>
      </div>

      <a href="bend_the_curve.html" class="tile" style="text-decoration:none;">
        <div class="tile-head">
          <div class="tile-icon" style="background:var(--green-dim);border-color:rgba(34,212,114,0.2);color:var(--green);"><i class="ti ti-trending-up"></i></div>
          <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right tile-arrow"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tile-title" style="color:var(--text-1);">Bend the Curve</div>
        <div class="tile-desc">Goal-first strategic planner — set an ASU or revenue target and activate initiatives to bend the forecast curve toward it, with lag and confidence modelling.</div>
        <div class="tile-stat">8 levers  ·  <span style="color:var(--green);">Gap-to-target</span></div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════ DASHBOARD ═════════════════════ -->
<div id="dashboard-view">
  <div class="dash-header">
    <div class="header-left">
      <button class="btn-icon" onclick="toggleLeftPanel()" title="Toggle Nav"><i class="ti ti-menu-2"></i></button>
      <div>
        <div class="header-brand" id="dash-title">ISG BPA: Business Planning and Analytics</div>
        <div class="breadcrumb" id="breadcrumb">
          <span onclick="goHome()">Home</span>
          <span class="sep">›</span>
          <span id="bc-module"></span>
          <span class="sep bc-page-sep" style="display:none;">›</span>
          <span id="bc-page" style="color:var(--text-1);"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-right">
      <span class="header-stamp" id="refresh-stamp"></span>
      <span class="ctx-badge" id="global-context">FY26 · All Regions</span>
      <button class="btn-icon" onclick="goHome()" title="Home"><i class="ti ti-home"></i></button>
      <button class="btn-icon" id="filter-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleRightPanel()" title="Filters"><i class="ti ti-adjustments-horizontal"></i></button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="dash-body">
    <div class="left-panel" id="left-panel">
      <div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-header" onclick="toggleAccordion(this)">
          <span>Navigation</span><i class="ti ti-chevron-down"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-content active" id="left-nav-links"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="main-content" id="main-content">
      <div class="filter-chips" id="filter-chips-row"></div>

      <!-- ══ MODULE: FORECAST ACCURACY ══ -->
      <div id="module-forecast-accuracy" class="module-section">
        <!-- ══ SUB-PAGE: FORECAST TREND ══ -->
        <div id="fa-page-forecast-trend" class="page-section active">

          <!-- KPI strip -->
          <div class="kpi-row">
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Current Week</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--accent)" id="ft-current-week">W22</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)" id="ft-current-week-sub">FY26 · Actuals through here</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">ASU Forecast Accuracy</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--green)" id="ft-asu-acc">—</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)" id="ft-asu-acc-sub">Overall · W01–W22</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">SR Forecast Accuracy</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--green)" id="ft-sr-acc">—</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)" id="ft-sr-acc-sub">Overall · W01–W22</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Dispatch Forecast Accuracy</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--green)" id="ft-dsp-acc">—</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)" id="ft-dsp-acc-sub">Overall · W01–W22</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Two-column chart area -->
          <div class="visual-row" style="align-items:stretch;">

            <!-- LEFT — SR / ASU / Dispatch trend chart -->
            <div class="visual-card" style="flex:1.8; flex-direction:column; min-width:0;">
              <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:6px; gap:12px;">
                <div style="flex:1; min-width:0;">
                  <div class="visual-title" style="margin-bottom:2px;" id="ft-chart-left-title">Weekly SR — FY26 Actuals & Forecast</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3);" id="ft-chart-left-sub">Service Requests per week  ·  W01–W52  ·  responds to FY & Product Group filters</div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-end; gap:6px; flex-shrink:0;">
                  <div class="ft-metric-toggle">
                    <button class="ft-metric-btn active" onclick="switchChartMetric('sr',this)">SR</button>
                    <button class="ft-metric-btn" onclick="switchChartMetric('asu',this)">ASU</button>
                    <button class="ft-metric-btn" onclick="switchChartMetric('dispatch',this)">Dispatch</button>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-2);">
                    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
                      <svg width="26" height="10"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="26" y2="5" stroke="#3a6ef0" stroke-width="2"/></svg>Actuals
                    </span>
                    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
                      <svg width="26" height="10"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="26" y2="5" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="8 4"/></svg>Forecast
                    </span>
                    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
                      <svg width="26" height="10"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="26" y2="5" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/></svg>Adj.
                    </span>
                    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
                      <svg width="26" height="10"><line x1="0" y1="5" x2="26" y2="5" stroke="#6366f1" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="10 4"/></svg>AOP
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="flex:1; min-height:320px; position:relative;">
                <canvas id="fa-chart-forecast-trend"></canvas>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- RIGHT — Weekly LOB Breakdown -->
            <div class="visual-card" style="flex:1; flex-direction:column; min-width:0;">
              <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:4px;">
                <div>
                  <div class="visual-title" style="margin-bottom:2px;">Weekly LOB Breakdown</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3);">W01–W52  ·  Static — unaffected by filters</div>
                </div>
                <div class="lob-metric-toggle">
                  <button class="lob-metric-btn active" onclick="switchLOBMetric('sr',this)">SR</button>
                  <button class="lob-metric-btn" onclick="switchLOBMetric('asu',this)">ASU</button>
                  <button class="lob-metric-btn" onclick="switchLOBMetric('dispatch',this)">Dispatch</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="lob-legend">
                <span><span class="lob-dot" style="background:#3a6ef0"></span>PowerEdge</span>
                <span><span class="lob-dot" style="background:#16a34a"></span>APEX</span>
                <span><span class="lob-dot" style="background:#d97706"></span>VXRAIL</span>
                <span><span class="lob-dot" style="background:#7c3aed"></span>POWERFLEX</span>
                <span><span class="lob-dot" style="background:#0891b2"></span>AVAMAR</span>
              </div>
              <div style="flex:1; min-height:180px; position:relative;">
                <canvas id="fa-chart-lob-weekly"></canvas>
              </div>
              <!-- Accuracy stats -->
              <div class="ft-stats-grid">
                <div class="ft-stat-tile">
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-label">MAPE</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-value" id="ft-mape">—</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-sub">Mean abs % error</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ft-stat-tile">
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-label">Bias</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-value" id="ft-bias">—</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-sub">Systematic over/under</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ft-stat-tile">
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-label">Best Week</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-value" style="font-size:15px" id="ft-best-week">—</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-sub">Lowest error</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ft-stat-tile">
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-label">Worst Week</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-value" style="font-size:15px" id="ft-worst-week">—</div>
                  <div class="ft-stat-tile-sub">Highest error</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- ══ MODULE: DATA RAW ══ -->
      <div id="module-data-raw" class="module-section">
        <div id="dr-page-raw" class="page-section active">
          <div class="kpi-row">
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Total Records</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--accent)" id="dr-total-records">1,204</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Data Completeness</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--green)">98.2%</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Anomalies Detected</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--red)">1,204</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Duplicate Records</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic">43</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="visual-card" style="min-height:auto;">
            <div class="visual-title">Full Raw Data View</div>
            <div class="table-toolbar">
              <input type="text" class="table-search" id="raw-search" placeholder="Search across all columns…" oninput="filterRawTable()">
              <div class="export-btns">
                <button class="export-btn csv" onclick="exportCSV()"><i class="ti ti-file-type-csv"></i> CSV</button>
                <button class="export-btn excel" onclick="exportExcel()"><i class="ti ti-file-spreadsheet"></i> Excel</button>
              </div>
              <div class="row-count" id="raw-row-count">0 of 0 rows</div>
            </div>
            <div class="table-wrap" style="max-height:calc(100vh - 360px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;">
              <table class="data-table" id="raw-data-table">
                <thead><tr>
                  <th class="row-num sticky-col" style="min-width:36px;">#</th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('region')" style="min-width:90px;">Region <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('subregion')" style="min-width:140px;">Sub-Region <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('partner')" style="min-width:120px;">Partner <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('location')" style="min-width:130px;">Location <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('queue')" style="min-width:110px;">Queue <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('busrep')" style="min-width:100px;">Bus Reporting <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('fy')" style="min-width:60px;">FY <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('quarter')" style="min-width:60px;">Quarter <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('month')" style="min-width:60px;">Month <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('week')" style="min-width:60px;">Week <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('sr')" style="min-width:110px;">Weekly SR Actuals <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('fasu')" style="min-width:120px;">Weekly Field ASU <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('tasu')" style="min-width:120px;">Weekly Tech ASU <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('fdsr')" style="min-width:130px;">Forecast Demand SR <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortRawTable('lob')" style="min-width:120px;">Product Group <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th style="min-width:110px;">Status</th>
                </tr></thead>
                <tbody id="raw-table-body"></tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ══ MODULE: ACTUALS PROFILING ══ -->
      <div id="module-demand-profiling" class="module-section">
        <div id="dp-page-overview" class="page-section active">

          <!-- KPI Summary Row -->
          <div class="kpi-row">
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Consistent</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:#16a34a">1,842</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)">Occ > 50% · CV < 50%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Erratic</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:#d97706">634</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)">Occ ≥ 50% · CV ≥ 50%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Intermittent</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:#2563eb">412</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)">Occ < 50% · CV < 50%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="kpi-card">
              <div class="kpi-label">Lumpy</div>
              <div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:#db2777">218</div>
              <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:var(--text-2)">Occ < 50% · CV ≥ 50%</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- 4-Quadrant Demand Classification Matrix -->
          <div class="dp-matrix-wrap">
            <div class="dp-y-label">
              <div class="dp-y-arrow">↑</div>
              <div class="dp-y-text">Frequency % (Occurrence variation)</div>
              <div class="dp-y-50pct">50%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="dp-matrix-body">
              <div class="dp-quadrant-grid">
                <div class="dp-quad dp-quad-consistent">
                  <div class="dp-quad-title">Consistent Demand</div>
                  <div class="dp-quad-canvas"><canvas id="dp-chart-consistent"></canvas></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-quad dp-quad-erratic">
                  <div class="dp-quad-title">Erratic Demand</div>
                  <div class="dp-quad-canvas"><canvas id="dp-chart-erratic"></canvas></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-quad dp-quad-intermittent">
                  <div class="dp-quad-title">Intermittent Demand</div>
                  <div class="dp-quad-canvas"><canvas id="dp-chart-intermittent"></canvas></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-quad dp-quad-lumpy">
                  <div class="dp-quad-title">Lumpy Demand</div>
                  <div class="dp-quad-canvas"><canvas id="dp-chart-lumpy"></canvas></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="dp-x-axis-row">
                <div class="dp-x-50pct">50%</div>
                <div class="dp-x-arrow">→</div>
                <div class="cv-tooltip-wrap">
                  <span class="dp-x-text">Coefficient of Variation (Demand)</span>
                  <button class="cv-info-btn" onclick="toggleCVTooltip(event)" aria-label="What is Coefficient of Variation?">i</button>
                  <div id="cv-tooltip-box" class="cv-tooltip-box" style="display:none;">
                    <div class="cv-tooltip-title">Coefficient of Variation (CV)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-2); margin-bottom:4px;">Measures how much demand fluctuates relative to its average.</div>
                    <div class="cv-tooltip-formula">CV = Standard Deviation ÷ Mean</div>
                    <div style="font-size:11.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-2); margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:2px;">How to interpret:</div>
                    <ul class="cv-tooltip-rules">
                      <li><strong style="color:var(--green)">Low CV (<50%)</strong> → Stable and consistent demand</li>
                      <li><strong style="color:var(--red)">High CV (≥50%)</strong> → Irregular and unpredictable demand</li>
                    </ul>
                    <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:8px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding-top:7px;">Use this to identify whether demand is steady or highly variable over time.</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Legend Table -->
          <div class="dp-legend-box">
            <div class="dp-legend-row">
              <div class="dp-legend-item">
                <span class="dp-legend-dot" style="background:#16a34a"></span>
                <span><strong>Consistent Demand</strong> :- Occurrence > 50% & Coefficient of Variation < 50%</span>
              </div>
              <div class="dp-legend-item">
                <span class="dp-legend-dot" style="background:#2563eb"></span>
                <span><strong>Intermittent Demand</strong> :- Occurrence < 50% & Coefficient of Variation < 50%</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dp-legend-row">
              <div class="dp-legend-item">
                <span class="dp-legend-dot" style="background:#d97706"></span>
                <span><strong>Erratic Demand</strong> :- Occurrence >= 50% & Coefficient of Variation >= 50%</span>
              </div>
              <div class="dp-legend-item">
                <span class="dp-legend-dot" style="background:#db2777"></span>
                <span><strong>Lumpy Demand</strong> :- Occurrence < 50% & Coefficient of Variation >= 50%</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>

        <!-- ══ SUB-PAGE: DEMAND TRENDS ══ -->
        <div id="dp-page-trends" class="page-section">
          <div class="dp-trends-section" style="margin-top:0;">
            <div class="dp-trends-header">
              <span class="dp-trends-title">Demand Trends</span>
              <span class="dp-trends-sub">Period-over-period movement — bars show demand volume, dashed line shows % change</span>
            </div>
            <div class="dp-trends-grid">
              <div class="dp-trend-card">
                <div class="dp-trend-card-header">
                  <span class="dp-trend-label">Year over Year</span>
                  <span class="dp-trend-badge dp-trend-badge-yoy">YoY</span>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-trend-legend">
                  <span><span class="dp-trend-legend-dot" style="background:rgba(22,163,74,0.75)"></span>Growth year</span>
                  <span><span class="dp-trend-legend-dot" style="background:rgba(220,38,38,0.7)"></span>Decline year</span>
                  <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:2px;border-top:2px dashed #b45309;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px"></span>YoY %</span>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-trend-canvas-wrap"><canvas id="dp-trend-yoy"></canvas></div>
              </div>
              <div class="dp-trend-card">
                <div class="dp-trend-card-header">
                  <span class="dp-trend-label">Quarter over Quarter</span>
                  <span class="dp-trend-badge dp-trend-badge-qoq">QoQ</span>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-trend-legend">
                  <span><span class="dp-trend-legend-dot" style="background:rgba(22,163,74,0.75)"></span>Up quarter</span>
                  <span><span class="dp-trend-legend-dot" style="background:rgba(220,38,38,0.7)"></span>Down quarter</span>
                  <span><span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:2px;border-top:2px dashed #0891b2;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px"></span>QoQ %</span>
                </div>
                <div class="dp-trend-canvas-wrap"><canvas id="dp-trend-qoq"></canvas></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- ══ MODULE: DEMAND ALERTS ══ -->
      <div id="module-demand-alerts" class="module-section">
        <div id="da-page-log" class="page-section active">
          <div class="kpi-row">
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Total Alerts</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--red)" id="da-total">12</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">High Priority</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--red)">5</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Medium Priority</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--amber)">4</div></div>
            <div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Low Priority</div><div class="kpi-value kpi-dynamic" style="color:var(--green)">3</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="visual-card" style="min-height:auto;">
            <div class="visual-title">Alerts Log</div>
            <div class="severity-filter">
              <button class="sev-btn all active" onclick="filterAlerts('all',this)">All</button>
              <button class="sev-btn high" onclick="filterAlerts('High',this)">High</button>
              <button class="sev-btn medium" onclick="filterAlerts('Medium',this)">Medium</button>
              <button class="sev-btn low" onclick="filterAlerts('Low',this)">Low</button>
            </div>
            <div class="table-wrap" style="max-height:380px;">
              <table class="data-table" id="alerts-table">
                <thead><tr>
                  <th onclick="sortTable('alerts-table','sev')">Severity <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th>Alert Description</th>
                  <th onclick="sortTable('alerts-table','date')">Trigger Date <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th onclick="sortTable('alerts-table','region')">Region <span class="sort-icon"></span></th>
                  <th>Sub-Region</th>
                </tr></thead>
                <tbody id="alerts-body"></tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ══ MODULE: WHAT-IF SIMULATION ══ -->
      <div id="module-whatif" class="module-section">

        <!-- ── PAGE 1: SIMULATION CONTROLS ── -->
        <div id="wi-page-sim" class="page-section active">

          <!-- 6 KPI cards 3×2 -->
          <div id="wi-kpi-row" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;"></div>

          <!-- Horizontal Forecast Propagation Pipeline -->
          <div class="visual-card" style="min-height:auto;margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div class="visual-title">
              <div>
                <div>Forecast Propagation</div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);margin-top:2px;font-weight:400;">Live downstream impact across the forecasting pipeline</div>
              </div>
              <span style="background:rgba(34,212,114,0.12);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(34,212,114,0.25);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">Auto-flowing</span>
            </div>
            <div id="wi-pipeline" style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;overflow-x:auto;padding:2px 0;gap:0;"></div>
          </div>

          <!-- Main 2-column: left=charts, right=inputs+impact -->
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 350px;gap:16px;align-items:start;">

            <!-- LEFT: Charts + Base Table -->
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;">

              <!-- ASU Trend — area band fill between base and what-if -->
              <div class="visual-card">
                <div class="visual-title">
                  <div>
                    <div>ASU Trend</div>
                    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);margin-top:2px;font-weight:400;">Base vs What-If projection</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;">
                    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);">
                      <span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:2px;background:#9ca3af;border-radius:2px;"></span>Base
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);">
                      <span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:2px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;"></span>What-If
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style="flex:1;min-height:220px;"><canvas id="wi-chart-asu"></canvas></div>
              </div>

              <!-- SR + Dispatch side by side -->

                </div>

                  <div class="visual-title">
                    <div>

                      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);margin-top:2px;font-weight:400;">Field dispatches projected (K)</div>
                    </div>

              <!-- Base Input table -->

        <div class="filter-dropdown" data-filter="region">

          <div class="filter-dropdown-content">
            <div class="check-list">
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="region" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="region" value="AMER" onchange="onFilterChange()"> AMER</label>

              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="subregion" value="SEA" onchange="onFilterChange()"> SEA</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="subregion" value="ANZ" onchange="onFilterChange()"> ANZ</label>

              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="New York Hub" onchange="onFilterChange()"> New York Hub</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="London HQ" onchange="onFilterChange()"> London HQ</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="Tokyo Base" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Tokyo Base</label>

              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="Queue_Alpha" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Queue_Alpha</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="Queue_Beta" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Queue_Beta</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="BR_Direct" onchange="onFilterChange()"> BR_Direct</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="BR_Indirect" onchange="onFilterChange()"> BR_Indirect</label>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// =========================================================
// DATA GENERATION
// =========================================================
const REGIONS = ['AMER','AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
const SUBREGIONS = {
  'AMER': ['North America','LATAM'],
  'EMEA': ['Western Europe','Eastern Europe'],
  'APJ': ['SEA','ANZ','Japan']
};
const PARTNERS = ['Dell','OSP'];
const LOCATIONS = ['New York Hub','London HQ','Tokyo Base','Austin DC','Sydney Office','Paris HQ'];
const QUEUES = ['Queue_Alpha','Queue_Beta','Queue_Delta'];
const BRS = ['BR_Direct','BR_Indirect'];
const LOBS = ['ISG','ESG','HES'];

function randInt(min, max) { return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min; }
function randFrom(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)]; }
function randFloat(min, max, dec=1) { return parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(dec)); }

let rawData = [];
function generateRawData() {
  rawData = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
    const region = randFrom(REGIONS);
    const subregion = randFrom(SUBREGIONS[region]);
    const partner = randFrom(PARTNERS);
    const location = randFrom(LOCATIONS);
    const queue = randFrom(QUEUES);
    const br = randFrom(BRS);
    const r2 = Math.random();
    const fy = r2 > 0.55 ? 'FY26' : r2 > 0.25 ? 'FY27' : 'FY25';
    const quarter = randFrom(['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4']);
    const month = randFrom(['M1','M2','M3','M4','M5','M6']);
    const weekNum = randInt(1, 52);
    const week = `W${weekNum}`;
    const sr = randInt(1000, 8000);
    const fasu = randInt(2000, 12000);
    const tasu = randInt(500, 6000);
    const fdsr = randInt(1000, 9000);
    const lob = randFrom(LOBS);
    const diff = Math.abs(sr - fdsr);
    const pct = diff / fdsr;
    const status = pct < 0.1 ? 'Within Tolerance' : 'Out of Bounds';
    rawData.push({ i: i+1, region, subregion, partner, location, queue, br, fy, quarter, month, week, weekNum, sr, fasu, tasu, fdsr, lob, status });
  }
}
generateRawData();

const ALERTS_DATA = [
  { sev:'High', desc:'ASU variance exceeds 10% tolerance threshold', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Missing data for LOB: Field Services W44', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Forecast demand drop >15% for Care queue — APJ', date:'2026-06-03', region:'APJ', subregion:'SEA' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Tech ASU weekly actuals below threshold — W22', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'LATAM' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Partner SLA breach — OSP dispatch >48hr', date:'2026-06-04', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Partner Dell SLA missed warning', date:'2026-06-01', region:'APJ', subregion:'ANZ' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Data completeness dropped to 94% — Austin DC', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Queue_Beta backlog growing — 3 consecutive weeks', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'MDR >8% sustained for Tokyo Base — review needed', date:'2026-05-30', region:'APJ', subregion:'Japan' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Forecast model retrain scheduled — W26', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Minor duplicate records detected — 43 rows', date:'2026-05-29', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'New York Hub location data lag — 2hr delay observed', date:'2026-06-04', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
];

// =========================================================
// THEME
// =========================================================
let isDark = false;
function updateChartTheme(chart) {
  const grid  = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';
  const ticks = isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280';
  if (!chart.options.scales) return;
  Object.values(chart.options.scales).forEach(s => {
    if (s.grid)  s.grid.color  = grid;
    if (s.ticks) s.ticks.color = ticks;
  });
}

// =========================================================
// MODULE CONFIG
// =========================================================
const modules = {
  'data-raw': { title: 'Data Management', pages: [{ id: 'dr-page-raw', label: 'Full Raw View' }] },
  'demand-profiling': { title: 'Actuals Profiling', pages: [
    { id: 'dp-page-overview', label: 'Profiling Overview' },
    { id: 'dp-page-trends',   label: 'Demand Trends' }
  ]},
  'forecast-accuracy': { title: 'Forecast Accuracy', pages: [
    { id: 'fa-page-forecast-trend', label: 'Forecast Trend' }
  ]},
  'demand-alerts': { title: 'Demand Planning Alerts', pages: [{ id: 'da-page-log', label: 'Alerts Log' }] },
  'whatif': { title: 'What-If Simulation', pages: [
    { id: 'wi-page-sim',       label: 'Simulation Controls' },
    { id: 'wi-page-scenarios', label: 'Scenario Playground' },
    { id: 'wi-page-publish',   label: 'Forecast Publish' }
  ]}
};

let activeModule = '';
let activePageLabel = '';

function openDashboard(moduleId) {
  activeModule = moduleId;
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'none';
  const dv = document.getElementById('dashboard-view');
  dv.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('dash-title').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;
  document.getElementById('bc-module').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;

  document.querySelectorAll('.module-section').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId).classList.add('active');

  const navContainer = document.getElementById('left-nav-links');
  navContainer.innerHTML = '';
  modules[moduleId].pages.forEach((page, idx) => {
    const link = document.createElement('div');
    link.className = 'nav-link' + (idx === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    link.innerText = page.label;
    link.onclick = () => switchPage(page.id, link, moduleId, page.label);
    navContainer.appendChild(link);
  });

  if (modules[moduleId].pages.length > 0) {
    const first = modules[moduleId].pages[0];
    switchPage(first.id, navContainer.firstChild, moduleId, first.label);
  }

  updateFilterChips();
  const filterBtn = document.getElementById('filter-toggle-btn');
  if (filterBtn) filterBtn.style.display = moduleId === 'whatif' ? 'none' : '';
  if (moduleId === 'whatif') {
    if (!document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.contains('collapsed')) {
      document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.add('collapsed');
    }
    setTimeout(wiInit, 80);
  } else { setTimeout(initCharts, 80); }
}

function goHome() {
  document.getElementById('dashboard-view').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'flex';
}

function switchPage(pageId, linkEl, moduleId, label) {
  const moduleEl = document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId);
  moduleEl.querySelectorAll('.page-section').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('left-nav-links').querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(pageId).classList.add('active');
  linkEl.classList.add('active');
  activePageLabel = label;

  const bcPage = document.getElementById('bc-page');
  const bcSep = document.querySelector('.bc-page-sep');
  bcPage.innerText = label;
  bcSep.style.display = 'inline';

  // Always reset filters on any page switch
  resetPageFilters();

  if (pageId === 'dr-page-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (pageId === 'da-page-log') renderAlerts('all');
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-actuals')        generateActualsTable();
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-partner')        generatePartnerTable();
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-sim')       { setTimeout(wiRenderAll, 60); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-scenarios') { wiRenderAIInsights(); wiRenderScenarios(); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-publish')   { wiRenderPublishReadiness(); wiRenderAudit(); }
  if (pageId === 'dp-page-overview' || pageId === 'dp-page-trends') {
    updateDPQuadrantCharts();
    updateDemandTrends();
  }
}

// =========================================================
// PANEL TOGGLES
// =========================================================
function toggleLeftPanel() { document.getElementById('left-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleRightPanel() { document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleAccordion(el) {
  const content = el.nextElementSibling;
  const icon = el.querySelector('i');
  content.classList.toggle('active');
  icon.className = content.classList.contains('active') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}
function toggleDropdown(btn) {
  btn.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open');
  const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
  icon.className = btn.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('open') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER INNER SEARCH
// =========================================================
function filterInner(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  const labels = input.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('label');
  labels.forEach(l => l.style.display = l.textContent.toUpperCase().includes(q) ? '' : 'none');
}
function searchFilters(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown').forEach(dd => {
    const label = dd.querySelector('.filter-dropdown-btn span').textContent.toUpperCase();
    dd.style.display = label.includes(q) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

let wHtml = '<label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="week" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>';
for (let i = 1; i <= 52; i++) {
