function openDashboard(moduleId) {
  activeModule = moduleId;
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'none';
  const dv = document.getElementById('dashboard-view');
  dv.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('dash-title').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;
  document.getElementById('bc-module').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;

  document.querySelectorAll('.module-section').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId).classList.add('active');

  const navContainer = document.getElementById('left-nav-links');
  navContainer.innerHTML = '';
  modules[moduleId].pages.forEach((page, idx) => {
    const link = document.createElement('div');
    link.className = 'nav-link' + (idx === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    link.innerText = page.label;
    link.onclick = () => switchPage(page.id, link, moduleId, page.label);
    navContainer.appendChild(link);
  });

  if (modules[moduleId].pages.length > 0) {
    const first = modules[moduleId].pages[0];
    switchPage(first.id, navContainer.firstChild, moduleId, first.label);
  }

  updateFilterChips();
  const filterBtn = document.getElementById('filter-toggle-btn');
  if (filterBtn) filterBtn.style.display = moduleId === 'whatif' ? 'none' : '';
  if (moduleId === 'whatif') {
    if (!document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.contains('collapsed')) {
      document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.add('collapsed');

  } else { setTimeout(initCharts, 80); }
}

function switchPage(pageId, linkEl, moduleId, label) {

  moduleEl.querySelectorAll('.page-section').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('left-nav-links').querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));

  linkEl.classList.add('active');
  activePageLabel = label;

  const bcPage = document.getElementById('bc-page');

const DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES = {};
function captureDefaults() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key] = cb.checked;
  });
}
setTimeout(captureDefaults, 100);

function resetFilters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    if (key in DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES) cb.checked = DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key];
    else cb.checked = false;
  });
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = 'FY26 · All Regions';
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER CHIPS
// =========================================================
function getActiveFilters() {
  const groupState = {};
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const group = cb.dataset.group;
    if (!group) return;
    if (!groupState[group]) groupState[group] = { allChecked: false, values: [] };
    if (cb.value === 'All') { if (cb.checked) groupState[group].allChecked = true; }
    else if (cb.checked) groupState[group].values.push(cb.value);
  });
  const active = {};
  Object.entries(groupState).forEach(([group, state]) => {
    if (!state.allChecked) active[group] = state.values;
  });
  return active;
}

function updateFilterChips() {
  const row = document.getElementById('filter-chips-row');
  row.innerHTML = '';
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  Object.entries(active).forEach(([group, values]) => {
    values.forEach(v => {
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'chip';
      chip.innerHTML = `<i class="ti ti-x" style="font-size:9px;"></i> ${group}: ${v}`;
      chip.title = 'Click to remove';
      chip.onclick = () => {
        const cb = document.querySelector(`#filter-container input[data-group="${group}"][value="${v}"]`);
        if (cb) { cb.checked = false; onFilterChange(); }
      };
      row.appendChild(chip);
    });
  });
  const fyChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="fy"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const regionChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="region"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const fyText = fyChecked.length ? fyChecked.join(', ') : 'All FY';
  const regionText = regionChecked.length ? regionChecked.join(', ') : 'All Regions';
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = `${fyText} · ${regionText}`;
}

function onFilterChange() {
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// DATA UPDATE
// =========================================================
const FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS = new Set([
  'fa-chart-hbar','fa-chart-partner',
  'dp-chart-consistent','dp-chart-erratic','dp-chart-intermittent','dp-chart-lumpy'
]);

function triggerDataUpdate() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.kpi-dynamic:not(#dr-total-records):not(#da-total)').forEach(el => {
    let t = el.innerText.trim();
    if (t.startsWith('+') || t.startsWith('-')) return;
    let isP = t.includes('%'), isK = t.includes('K'), isM = t.endsWith('M');
    let n = parseFloat(t.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
    if (isNaN(n) || n === 0) return;
    let v = n * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.1 - 0.05));
    if (isP) {
      v = Math.max(0, Math.min(99.9, v));
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(1) + '%';
    } else if (isM) {
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(2) + 'M';
    } else if (isK) {
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(1) + 'K';
    } else {
      el.innerText = Math.round(Math.max(0, v)).toLocaleString('en-IN');
    }
  });
  if (activeModule === 'data-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (activeModule === 'demand-alerts') renderAlerts(currentAlertFilter);
  if (activeModule === 'forecast-accuracy') { generateActualsTable(); generatePartnerTable(); }
  Object.entries(chartInstances).forEach(([id, c]) => {
    if (!c || FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS.has(id)) return;
    c.data.datasets.forEach(ds => {
      ds.data = ds.data.map(v => Math.max(10, v * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.3 - 0.15))));
    });
    c.update();
  });
  applyAllFilteredCharts();
}

function gridColor() { return isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'; }
function axisColor() { return isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280'; }

function baseLineOptions(stacked = false) {
  return {
    responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: axisColor(), boxWidth: 12, font: { size: 11 } } } },
    scales: {
      x: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } },
      y: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } }
    }
  };
}

function switchChartType(chartId, newType, btnEl) {
  const chart = chartInstances[chartId];
  if (!chart) return;
  chart.config.type = newType;
  chart.update();
  btnEl.closest('.chart-toggle').querySelectorAll('.chart-toggle-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btnEl.classList.add('active');
}

function initCharts() {
  Object.values(chartInstances).forEach(c => { if (c) c.destroy(); });
  Object.keys(chartInstances).forEach(k => delete chartInstances[k]);

  function mk(id, type, data, options) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el.getContext('2d'), { type, data, options: options || baseLineOptions() });
  }

  initForecastTrendChart();
  initDemandProfilingQuadrants();
  initDemandTrends();
  applyAllFilteredCharts();
}

// =========================================================
// ACTUALS PROFILING — 4-QUADRANT DEMAND CLASSIFICATION
// =========================================================
function initDemandProfilingQuadrants() {
  const MONTHS = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
  const labels = [];
  for (let y = 2016; y <= 2022; y++) {
    MONTHS.forEach(m => labels.push(m + ' ' + y));
  }

  function seeded(seed) {
    let s = seed;
    return () => { s = (s * 16807 + 0) % 2147483647; return (s - 1) / 2147483646; };
  }

  const rC = seeded(42);
  const consistent = labels.map((_, i) => {
    const seasonal = Math.sin((i / 12) * 2 * Math.PI - 1) * 18e6;
    return +(Math.max(18e6, 38e6 + seasonal + i * 180000 + (rC() - 0.5) * 4e6)).toFixed(0);
  });

  const rE = seeded(77);
  const erratic = labels.map(() => +((0.3 + rE() * 4.5) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  const rI = seeded(13);
  const intermittent = labels.map(() => rI() < 0.45 ? 0 : +((1.2 + rI() * 2.3) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  const rL = seeded(99);
  const lumpy = labels.map(() => rL() < 0.68 ? 0 : +((0.05 + rL() * 0.43) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  _dpBaseData = { consistent, erratic, intermittent, lumpy };

  const mkQ = (id, color, data, yMax, yStep) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    if (chartInstances[id]) { chartInstances[id].destroy(); delete chartInstances[id]; }
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el, {
      type: 'line',
      data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, borderColor: color, backgroundColor: 'transparent', fill: false }] },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: { callbacks: { title: ctx => ctx[0].label, label: ctx => ' ' + (ctx.raw/1e6).toFixed(2) + 'M' } }
        },
        scales: {
          x: {
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: {
              color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, maxTicksLimit: 8,
              callback: function(val, i) {
                return labels[i] && labels[i].startsWith('Jan') ? labels[i].split(' ')[1] : '';
              }
            }
          },
          y: {
            min: 0, max: yMax,
            grid: { color: gridColor() },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, stepSize: yStep, callback: v => (v/1e6).toFixed(0)+'M' }
          }
        },
        elements: { point: { radius: 0 }, line: { tension: 0.35, borderWidth: 1.5 } }
      }
    });
  };

  mkQ('dp-chart-consistent',   '#16a34a', consistent,   72e6,   18e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-erratic',      '#d97706', erratic,       5.5e6,  1e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-intermittent', '#2563eb', intermittent,  4e6,    1e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-lumpy',        '#db2777', lumpy,         0.6e6,  0.15e6);
}

function initDemandTrends() {
  const yoyLabels = ['FY22','FY23','FY24','FY25','FY26 YTD'];
  const yoyDemand = [985000,1048000,1108000,1179000,1257000];
  const yoyPct    = [null,6.4,5.7,6.4,6.6];

  const qoqLabels = ['Q3 FY24','Q4 FY24','Q1 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q4 FY25','Q1 FY26','Q2 FY26'];
  const qoqDemand = [284000,298000,306000,294000,315000,308000,325000,338000];
  const qoqPct    = [null,4.9,2.7,-3.9,7.1,-2.2,5.5,4.0];

  const mkTrend = (id, labels, demand, pct, lineColor) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    if (chartInstances[id]) { chartInstances[id].destroy(); delete chartInstances[id]; }
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el, {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels,
        datasets: [
          {
            type: 'bar',
            label: 'Demand',
            data: demand,
            backgroundColor: demand.map((_, i) =>
              pct[i] === null ? 'rgba(144,153,190,0.45)' :
              pct[i] >= 0    ? 'rgba(22,163,74,0.75)' :
                               'rgba(220,38,38,0.72)'),
            borderRadius: 4,
            borderSkipped: false,
            yAxisID: 'y'
          },
          {
            type: 'line',
            label: '% Change',
            data: pct,
            borderColor: lineColor,
            backgroundColor: 'transparent',
            borderWidth: 2,
            borderDash: [5, 3],
            pointRadius: 3,
            pointBackgroundColor: lineColor,
            pointBorderWidth: 0,
            spanGaps: false,
            tension: 0.3,
            yAxisID: 'y1'
          }
        ]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: {
            callbacks: {
              label: ctx => {
                if (ctx.dataset.label === 'Demand') {
                  const v = ctx.raw >= 1e6 ? (ctx.raw/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M' : (ctx.raw/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K';
                  return ' Demand: ' + v;
                }
                if (ctx.raw === null || ctx.raw === undefined) return ' Change: —';
                return ' Change: ' + (ctx.raw >= 0 ? '+' : '') + ctx.raw.toFixed(1) + '%';
              }
            }
          }
        },
        scales: {
          x: {
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 } }
          },
          y: {
            position: 'left', min: 0,
            grid: { color: gridColor() },
            ticks: {
              color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 },
              callback: v => v >= 1e6 ? (v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M' : v >= 1e3 ? (v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K' : v
            }
          },
          y1: {
            position: 'right',
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, callback: v => v + '%' }
          }
        }
      }
    });
  };

  // Initialize with empty data — updateDemandTrends() applies the correct filtered state immediately after
  mkTrend('dp-trend-yoy', [], [], [], '#b45309');
  mkTrend('dp-trend-qoq', [], [], [], '#0891b2');
}

// =========================================================
// FORECAST TREND — SR ACTUALS / FORECAST / ADJUSTED FORECAST
// =========================================================
function _ftUpdateKPIs(scaledActuals, scaledForecast, scaledAdj, errors, weeks, TODAY_IDX) {
  // Right-panel stat tiles (still present in the error chart section)
  const elMape = document.getElementById('ft-mape');
  const elBias = document.getElementById('ft-bias');
  const elBest = document.getElementById('ft-best-week');
  const elWrst = document.getElementById('ft-worst-week');

  // Top KPI cards
  const elCW      = document.getElementById('ft-current-week');
  const elCWSub   = document.getElementById('ft-current-week-sub');
  const elASU     = document.getElementById('ft-asu-acc');
  const elASUSub  = document.getElementById('ft-asu-acc-sub');
  const elSR      = document.getElementById('ft-sr-acc');
  const elSRSub   = document.getElementById('ft-sr-acc-sub');
  const elDSP     = document.getElementById('ft-dsp-acc');
  const elDSPSub  = document.getElementById('ft-dsp-acc-sub');

  const curWeekLabel = weeks[TODAY_IDX] || 'W22';
  if (elCW)    elCW.innerText    = curWeekLabel;
  if (elCWSub) elCWSub.innerText = 'FY26 · Actuals through here';

  if (errors.length) {
    const absErr  = errors.map(Math.abs);
    const mapeVal = absErr.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / absErr.length;
    const mapeStr = mapeVal.toFixed(1) + '%';
    const rawBias = errors.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / errors.length;
    const biasStr = (rawBias >= 0 ? '+' : '') + rawBias.toFixed(1) + '%';
    const minI    = absErr.indexOf(Math.min(...absErr));
    const maxI    = absErr.indexOf(Math.max(...absErr));

    // Right-panel stat tiles
    if (elMape) elMape.innerText = mapeStr;
    if (elBias) { elBias.innerText = biasStr; elBias.style.color = Math.abs(rawBias)<2?'var(--green)':rawBias>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)'; }
    if (elBest) elBest.innerText = weeks[minI] || '—';
    if (elWrst) elWrst.innerText = weeks[maxI] || '—';

    // KPI card accuracy values
    // SR accuracy derived from SR error data; ASU & Dispatch use calibrated base values
    const fyMult  = getActiveFYMultiplier();
    const srAcc   = Math.min(99.9, 100 - mapeVal);
    const asuAcc  = Math.min(99.9, 95.4 + (fyMult - 1.0) * 1.8);
    const dspAcc  = Math.min(99.9, 97.1 + (fyMult - 1.0) * 1.2);
    const accColor = v => v >= 95 ? 'var(--green)' : v >= 90 ? 'var(--amber)' : 'var(--red)';
    const periodSub = 'Overall · ' + (weeks[0]||'W01') + '–' + curWeekLabel;

    if (elASU)    { elASU.innerText    = asuAcc.toFixed(1) + '%'; elASU.style.color = accColor(asuAcc); }
    if (elASUSub)   elASUSub.innerText = periodSub;
    if (elSR)     { elSR.innerText     = srAcc.toFixed(1)  + '%'; elSR.style.color  = accColor(srAcc);  }
    if (elSRSub)    elSRSub.innerText  = periodSub;
    if (elDSP)    { elDSP.innerText    = dspAcc.toFixed(1) + '%'; elDSP.style.color = accColor(dspAcc); }
    if (elDSPSub)   elDSPSub.innerText = periodSub;
  }
}

function initForecastTrendChart() {
  const TODAY_IDX = 21;
  const weeks = Array.from({length:52}, (_,i) => 'W'+String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'));
  function seeded(s) { return ()=>{ s=(s*16807)%2147483647; return (s-1)/2147483646; }; }
  const rA=seeded(42), rF=seeded(77), rAd=seeded(13), rP=seeded(88);

  const actuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((612000-i*1700)+(rA()-0.5)*36000));
  const lastActual = actuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const forecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if (i<TODAY_IDX) return null;
    const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? lastActual : Math.round((lastActual-d*1100)+(rF()-0.5)*16000);
  });
  const adjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if (i<TODAY_IDX) return null;
    const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? lastActual : Math.round((lastActual-d*580+9000)+(rAd()-0.5)*10000);
  });
  const planForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round(607000+(rP()-0.5)*22000));
  // ── ASU data ── (weekly ~295K, gentle growth)
  const rAsu1=seeded(101), rAsu2=seeded(102), rAsu3=seeded(103);
  const asuActuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((295000+i*220)+(rAsu1()-0.5)*17000));
  const asuLast = asuActuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const asuForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? asuLast : Math.round((asuLast+d*160)+(rAsu2()-0.5)*7500);
  });
  const asuAdjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? asuLast : Math.round((asuLast+d*90+3800)+(rAsu3()-0.5)*4800);
  });

  // ── Dispatch data ── (weekly ~6200, slight decline)
  const rDsp1=seeded(201), rDsp2=seeded(202), rDsp3=seeded(203);
  const dspActuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((6200-i*14)+(rDsp1()-0.5)*580));
  const dspLast = dspActuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const dspForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? dspLast : Math.round((dspLast-d*11)+(rDsp2()-0.5)*380);
  });
  const dspAdjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? dspLast : Math.round((dspLast-d*7+90)+(rDsp3()-0.5)*260);
  });

  _ftMetricData = {
    sr:       { actuals, forecast, adjForecast },
    asu:      { actuals: asuActuals, forecast: asuForecast, adjForecast: asuAdjForecast },
    dispatch: { actuals: dspActuals, forecast: dspForecast, adjForecast: dspAdjForecast }
  };
  _ftBaseData = { actuals, forecast, adjForecast, planForecast, weeks, TODAY_IDX };

  const mult = getDPLOBMult() * getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const sA  = actuals.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sF  = forecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sAd = adjForecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const errWeeks = weeks.slice(0,TODAY_IDX+1);
  const errors = errWeeks.map((_,i) => {
    const v=actuals[i], p=planForecast[i];
    return (v==null||p==null) ? null : +((p*mult-v*mult)/(v*mult)*100).toFixed(1);
  }).filter(v=>v!=null);

  // ── Main SR trend chart ──────────────────────────────────
  const mainId='fa-chart-forecast-trend';
  const mainEl=document.getElementById(mainId);
  if (chartInstances[mainId]) { chartInstances[mainId].destroy(); delete chartInstances[mainId]; }

  const vertDivider = {
    id:'ft_divider',
    afterDraw(chart) {
      if (chart.canvas.id!==mainId) return;
      const {ctx,chartArea:{top,bottom},scales:{x}}=chart; if(!x) return;
      const px=x.getPixelForValue(TODAY_IDX);
      ctx.save();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.setLineDash([5,4]);
      ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
      ctx.moveTo(px,top); ctx.lineTo(px,bottom); ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);
      const lbl='▶ Current Week'; ctx.font='500 9px "Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif';
      const tw=ctx.measureText(lbl).width;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.1)';
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(px+5,top+4,tw+10,16,4); ctx.fill();
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.85)'; ctx.fillText(lbl,px+10,top+15);
      ctx.restore();
    }
  };

  const aopVal = getAOPTargetValue(); // always the raw FY target, no LOB scaling
  const sAOP   = weeks.map(() => aopVal);

  if (mainEl) chartInstances[mainId] = new Chart(mainEl, {
    type:'line', plugins:[vertDivider],
    data:{ labels:weeks, datasets:[
      { label:'Actuals',           data:sA,   borderColor:'#3a6ef0', backgroundColor:'rgba(58,110,240,0.07)', borderWidth:2,   fill:true,  tension:0.35, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'Forecast',          data:sF,   borderColor:'#16a34a', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2.5, borderDash:[8,4],  tension:0.4,  pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'Adjusted Forecast', data:sAd,  borderColor:'#d97706', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2.5, borderDash:[3,3],  tension:0.4,  pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'AOP Target',        data:sAOP, borderColor:'#6366f1', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2,   borderDash:[10,4], tension:0,    pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:3, spanGaps:true  }
    ]},
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
      plugins:{
        legend:{display:false},
        tooltip:{
          backgroundColor:'#fff',borderColor:'#dde2f4',borderWidth:1,
          titleColor:'#5a6280',bodyColor:'#0d1020',padding:10,
          callbacks:{
            title:ctx=>'FY26 · '+ctx[0].label,
            label:ctx=>ctx.raw==null?null:' '+ctx.dataset.label+': '+ctx.raw.toLocaleString('en-IN'),
            afterBody:ctx=>{
              const a=ctx.find(c=>c.dataset.label==='Actuals'), f=ctx.find(c=>c.dataset.label==='Forecast');
              if(a&&f&&a.raw!=null&&f.raw!=null){
                const d=((f.raw-a.raw)/a.raw*100).toFixed(1);
                return[' ─────────────',' Fcst vs Actual: '+(d>=0?'+':'')+d+'%'];
              }
              return[];
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales:{
        x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:axisColor(),font:{size:9},maxTicksLimit:14,callback(v,i){return i%4===0?weeks[i]?weeks[i]:''?'':''?'':weeks[i]:''}}},
        y:{grid:{color:gridColor()},min:0,ticks:{color:axisColor(),font:{size:9},callback:v=>v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v}}
      }
    }
  });

  initLOBWeeklyChart();
  _ftUpdateKPIs(sA, sF, sAd, errors, errWeeks, TODAY_IDX);
}

function updateForecastTrendChart() {
  if (!_ftBaseData) return;
  const {actuals,forecast,adjForecast,planForecast,weeks,TODAY_IDX}=_ftBaseData;
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  const mult = hideAll ? 0 : getDPLOBMult()*getActiveFYMultiplier();

  // Use current metric data
  const md = _ftMetricData[_ftMetric] || { actuals, forecast, adjForecast };
  const sA =hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.actuals.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sF =hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.forecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sAd=hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.adjForecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);

  // Errors always from SR data for stat tiles (unchanged)
  const errWeeks=weeks.slice(0,TODAY_IDX+1);
  const errors=hideAll ? [] : errWeeks.map((_,i)=>{
    const v=actuals[i],p=planForecast[i];
    return (v==null||p==null)?null:+((p*mult-v*mult)/(v*mult)*100).toFixed(1);
  }).filter(v=>v!=null);

  // AOP always visible — metric-aware target, no filter gating
  const aopVal = getAOPTargetValue();
  const mc=chartInstances['fa-chart-forecast-trend'];
  if(mc){
    mc.data.datasets[0].data=sA;
    mc.data.datasets[1].data=sF;
    mc.data.datasets[2].data=sAd;
    mc.data.datasets[3].data=weeks.map(()=>aopVal);
    mc.options.scales.y.ticks.callback = (FT_METRIC_CONF[_ftMetric]||FT_METRIC_CONF.sr).yFmt;
    mc.update('none');
  }
  _ftUpdateKPIs(sA,sF,sAd,errors,errWeeks,TODAY_IDX);
}

function switchChartMetric(metric, btnEl) {
  _ftMetric = metric;
  document.querySelectorAll('.ft-metric-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('active');
  const conf = FT_METRIC_CONF[metric] || FT_METRIC_CONF.sr;
  const titleEl = document.getElementById('ft-chart-left-title');
  const subEl   = document.getElementById('ft-chart-left-sub');
  if (titleEl) titleEl.innerHTML = conf.title;
  if (subEl)   subEl.innerHTML   = conf.sub;
  updateForecastTrendChart();
}

// =========================================================
// FISCAL WEEK × LOB CHART — STATIC (no filter dependency)
// =========================================================
const LOB_NAMES   = ['PowerEdge','APEX','VXRAIL','POWERFLEX','AVAMAR'];
const LOB_COLORS  = { PowerEdge:'#3a6ef0', APEX:'#16a34a', VXRAIL:'#d97706', POWERFLEX:'#7c3aed', AVAMAR:'#0891b2' };
const FW_LABELS   = Array.from({length:52}, (_,i) => 'W'+String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'));

const LOB_WEEKLY_DATA = (() => {
  function seeded(s) { return () => { s=(s*16807)%2147483647; return (s-1)/2147483646; }; }
  const N = 52;
  const bases = { PowerEdge:{sr:2700,asuX:14,dspX:0.44}, APEX:{sr:1100,asuX:18,dspX:0.38},
                  VXRAIL:{sr:780,asuX:12,dspX:0.50}, POWERFLEX:{sr:440,asuX:10,dspX:0.34}, AVAMAR:{sr:290,asuX:8,dspX:0.42} };
  const seeds = { PowerEdge:11, APEX:22, VXRAIL:33, POWERFLEX:44, AVAMAR:55 };
  const result = { sr:{}, asu:{}, dispatch:{} };

  LOB_NAMES.forEach(lob => {
    const r = seeded(seeds[lob]);
    const b = bases[lob];
    const sr = Array.from({length:N}, (_, i) => {
      const seasonal = 1 + 0.22 * Math.sin((i - 8) / N * 2 * Math.PI);
      return Math.max(50, Math.round(b.sr * seasonal + (r() - 0.5) * b.sr * 0.28));
    });
    result.sr[lob]       = sr;
    result.asu[lob]      = sr.map(v => Math.round(v * b.asuX * (0.88 + r() * 0.24)));
    result.dispatch[lob] = sr.map(v => Math.round(v * b.dspX * (0.88 + r() * 0.24)));
  });
  return result;
})();

let _lobMetric = 'sr';

function initLOBWeeklyChart() {
  const el = document.getElementById('fa-chart-lob-weekly');
  if (!el) return;
  if (chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly']) {
    chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'].destroy();
    delete chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  }
  chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'] = new Chart(el, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: FW_LABELS,
      datasets: LOB_NAMES.map(lob => ({
        label: lob,
        data: LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[_lobMetric][lob],
        borderColor: LOB_COLORS[lob],
        backgroundColor: 'transparent',
        borderWidth: 1.6,
        tension: 0.3,
        pointRadius: 0,
        pointHoverRadius: 4,
        spanGaps: true
      }))
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
      plugins: {
        legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: {
          backgroundColor: '#fff', borderColor: '#dde2f4', borderWidth: 1,
          titleColor: '#5a6280', bodyColor: '#0d1020', padding: 8,
          callbacks: {
            title: ctx => 'FW · ' + ctx[0].label,
            label: ctx => ' ' + ctx.dataset.label + ': ' + ctx.raw.toLocaleString('en-IN')
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { grid:{display:false}, ticks:{color:axisColor(), font:{size:8.5}, maxTicksLimit:13,
               callback(v,i){ return i%4===0 ? FW_LABELS[i] : ''; }} },
        y: { grid:{color:gridColor()}, min:0, ticks:{color:axisColor(), font:{size:8.5},
               callback: v => v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v} }
      }
    }
  });
}

function switchLOBMetric(metric, btnEl) {
  _lobMetric = metric;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lob-metric-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('active');
  const c = chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  if (!c) return;
  LOB_NAMES.forEach((lob, i) => { c.data.datasets[i].data = LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[metric][lob]; });
  c.update('none');
}

function updateLOBWeeklyChart() {
  const c = chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  if (!c) return;
  const f = getActiveFilters();
  const weekEmpty = f.week !== undefined && f.week.length === 0;
  if (weekEmpty) {
    c.data.labels = [];
    c.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.data = []; });
  } else {
    c.data.labels = FW_LABELS;
    LOB_NAMES.forEach((lob, i) => { c.data.datasets[i].data = LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[_lobMetric][lob]; });
  }
  c.update('none');
}

function toggleCVTooltip(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  const box = document.getElementById('cv-tooltip-box');
  if (!box) return;
  const isVisible = box.style.display !== 'none';
  box.style.display = isVisible ? 'none' : 'block';
  if (!isVisible) {
    // Close on next outside click
    const close = ev => { if (!box.contains(ev.target)) { box.style.display='none'; document.removeEventListener('click', close); } };
    setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', close), 0);
  }
}

// =========================================================
// TIME FILTER MAPPING
// =========================================================
const Q_WEEKS = {
  Q1: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 1),
  Q2: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 14),
  Q3: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 27),
  Q4: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 40),
};
const M_WEEKS = {
  M1: [1,2,3,4], M2: [5,6,7,8], M3: [9,10,11,12,13],
  M4: [14,15,16,17], M5: [18,19,20,21,22], M6: [23,24,25,26],
};
const FY_SCALE = { FY25: 0.92, FY26: 1.0, FY27: 1.08 };

function _makeTrend(base, amp, phase) {
  return Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) =>
    Math.max(10, Math.round(base + amp * Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * (i + (phase || 0)) / 13)))
  );
}
const TREND_DATA_52 = {
  'fa-asu':          _makeTrend(140,  20, 0),
  'fa-wo':           _makeTrend(90,   12, 0),
  'dp-ov-fs':        _makeTrend(540,  60, 0),
  'dp-ov-care':      _makeTrend(420,  45, 2),
  'dp-ov-ms':        _makeTrend(215,  25, 4),
  'dp-ov-forecast':  _makeTrend(1175, 130, 0),
  'dp-ov-actuals':   _makeTrend(1115, 125, 0),
  'dp-fld-dis':      _makeTrend(660,  70, 1),
  'dp-fld-fct':      _makeTrend(650,  65, 1),
  'dp-care-forecast':_makeTrend(1080, 107, 2),
  'dp-care-actuals': _makeTrend(1025, 102, 2),
  'care-cf-fct':     _makeTrend( 950,  95, 1),
  'care-cf-act':     _makeTrend( 900,  90, 1),
  'care-apos-fct':   _makeTrend( 420,  42, 3),
  'care-apos-act':   _makeTrend( 399,  40, 3),
  'care-sr-fct':     _makeTrend( 680,  68, 2),
  'care-sr-act':     _makeTrend( 646,  65, 2),
  'care-dsp-fct':    _makeTrend( 520,  52, 4),
  'care-dsp-act':    _makeTrend( 494,  49, 4),
  'dp-care-amer':    _makeTrend(510,  50, 0),
  'dp-care-emea':    _makeTrend(350,  35, 3),
  'dp-care-apj':     _makeTrend(220,  22, 6),
};

function getSelectedWeekIndices() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  let idx = Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) => i);
  if (active.quarter !== undefined) {
    if (active.quarter.length === 0) return [];
    const qNums = active.quarter.flatMap(q => Q_WEEKS[q] || []);
    idx = idx.filter(i => qNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.month !== undefined) {
    if (active.month.length === 0) return [];
    const mNums = active.month.flatMap(m => M_WEEKS[m] || []);
    if (mNums.length) idx = idx.filter(i => mNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.week !== undefined) {
    if (active.week.length === 0) return [];
    const wNums = active.week.map(w => parseInt(w.slice(1)));
    idx = idx.filter(i => wNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  return idx;
}

function getActiveFYMultiplier() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const fys = active.fy;
  if (fys === undefined) return (FY_SCALE.FY26 + FY_SCALE.FY27) / 2;
  if (fys.length === 0)  return 0;
  return fys.reduce((s, f) => s + (FY_SCALE[f] || 1.0), 0) / fys.length;
}

// Maps Quarter/Month filter selections to indices 0-11 of a 12-month (Feb–Jan) data array
const AP_MONTHS = ['Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan'];
const Q_MONTH_IDX = { Q1:[0,1,2], Q2:[3,4,5], Q3:[6,7,8], Q4:[9,10,11] };
const M_LABEL_IDX = { M1:0, M2:1, M3:2, M4:3, M5:4, M6:5 };

function getSelectedFiscalMonthIndices() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  let idx = Array.from({length: 12}, (_, i) => i);
  if (active.quarter !== undefined) {
    if (active.quarter.length === 0) return [];
    const qIdx = active.quarter.flatMap(q => Q_MONTH_IDX[q] || []);
    idx = idx.filter(i => qIdx.includes(i));
  }
  if (active.month !== undefined) {
    if (active.month.length === 0) return [];
    const mIdx = active.month.map(m => M_LABEL_IDX[m]).filter(i => i !== undefined);
    if (mIdx.length > 0) idx = idx.filter(i => mIdx.includes(i));
  }
  return idx;
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER-AWARE CHART UPDATE FUNCTIONS
// =========================================================

// Returns true if ANY filter group has zero items selected (nothing to show)
function shouldHideAll() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  if (getActiveFYMultiplier() === 0) return true;
  if (active.quarter !== undefined && active.quarter.length === 0) return true;
  if (active.month   !== undefined && active.month.length   === 0) return true;
  if (active.region  !== undefined && active.region.length  === 0) return true;
  return false;
}

// Returns which of the 4 quarters to render based on the quarter filter
function getSelectedQuarters() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const allQ = ['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'];
  return active.quarter === undefined ? allQ : allQ.filter(q => active.quarter.includes(q));
}

function _filterByRegion(data) {
  const r = getActiveFilters().region;
  if (r === undefined) return data;
  return data.filter(d => r.includes(d.region));
}

function updateFARegionChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-hbar'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const mult = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const r    = getActiveFilters().region;
  const allR = ['AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
  const regions = r === undefined ? allR : allR.filter(x => r.includes(x));
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  chart.data.labels = hideAll ? [] : regions;
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = hideAll ? [] : regions.map(x => Math.round(FA_REGION_BASE[x].actuals  * mult));
  chart.data.datasets[1].data = hideAll ? [] : regions.map(x => Math.round(FA_REGION_BASE[x].forecast * mult));
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

function updateFAPartnerChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-partner'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  const filtered = hideAll ? [] : FA_PARTNER_BASE;
  chart.data.labels = filtered.map(x => x.name);
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = filtered.map(x => x.mdr);
  chart.data.datasets[0].backgroundColor = filtered.map(x => x.color);
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

function updateFAOverviewChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-overview'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const mult = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const idx  = getSelectedWeekIndices();
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll() || idx.length === 0;
  chart.data.labels = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => `W${i + 1}`);
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => Math.round(TREND_DATA_52['fa-asu'][i] * mult));
  chart.data.datasets[1].data = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => Math.round(TREND_DATA_52['fa-wo'][i]  * mult));
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

// ACTUALS PROFILING — FILTER STATE & PER-PRODUCT-GROUP DATA
// =========================================================
let _dpBaseData   = null;
let _ftBaseData   = null;
let _ftMetricData = {};
let _ftMetric     = 'sr';

// Per-metric AOP weekly targets per FY
const AOP_METRIC_TARGETS = {
  sr:       { FY25: 540000, FY26: 590000, FY27: 638000 },
  asu:      { FY25: 268000, FY26: 298000, FY27: 325000 },
  dispatch: { FY25: 5600,   FY26: 6100,   FY27: 6650   }
};

// Per-metric chart display config (title, subtitle, y-axis format)
const FT_METRIC_CONF = {
  sr: {
    title: 'Weekly SR — FY26 Actuals & Forecast',
    sub:   'Service Requests per week  ·  W01–W52  ·  responds to FY & Product Group filters',
    yFmt:  v => v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v
  },
  asu: {
    title: 'Weekly ASU — FY26 Actuals & Forecast',
    sub:   'Attached Service Units per week  ·  W01–W52  ·  responds to FY & Product Group filters',
    yFmt:  v => v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v
  },
  dispatch: {
    title: 'Weekly Dispatch — FY26 Actuals & Forecast',
    sub:   'Dispatch volumes per week  ·  W01–W52  ·  responds to FY & Product Group filters',
    yFmt:  v => v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(1)+'K':v
  }
};

// AOP — per current metric, per active FY, always visible
function getAOPTargetValue() {
  const targets = AOP_METRIC_TARGETS[_ftMetric] || AOP_METRIC_TARGETS.sr;
  const f   = getActiveFilters();
  const fys = f.fy;
  if (!fys || fys.length === 0) return targets.FY26;
  const avg = fys.reduce((s, fy) => s + (targets[fy] || targets.FY26), 0) / fys.length;
  return Math.round(avg);
}

const DP_LOB_SHARE = { ISG: 0.60, ESG: 0.25, HES: 0.15 };

// ISG + ESG + HES annual totals and quarterly sums per product group
const DP_TREND_PG = {
  ISG: {
    yoy: [591000,629000,665000,707000,754000],
    qoq: [170400,178800,183600,176400,189000,184800,195000,202800]
  },
  ESG: {
    yoy: [246000,262000,277000,295000,314000],
    qoq: [71000,74500,76500,73500,78750,77000,81250,84500]
  },
  HES: {
    yoy: [148000,157000,166000,177000,189000],
    qoq: [42600,44700,45900,44100,47250,46200,48750,50700]
  }
};

// Metadata for filter-aware clipping
const YOY_FULL_LABELS = ['FY22','FY23','FY24','FY25','FY26 YTD'];
const YOY_FY_TAG      = [null,   null,   null,  'FY25','FY26'];  // null = historical baseline

const QOQ_FULL_LABELS = ['Q3 FY24','Q4 FY24','Q1 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q4 FY25','Q1 FY26','Q2 FY26'];
const QOQ_FY_TAG      = ['FY24','FY24','FY25','FY25','FY25','FY25','FY26','FY26'];
const QOQ_Q_TAG       = ['Q3',  'Q4',  'Q1',  'Q2',  'Q3',  'Q4',  'Q1',  'Q2'];

function getDPLOBMult() {
  const f = getActiveFilters();
  if (!f.lob || f.lob.length === 0) return 1.0;
  return f.lob.reduce((s, pg) => s + (DP_LOB_SHARE[pg] || 0), 0);
}

function updateDPQuadrantCharts() {
  if (!_dpBaseData) return;
  const mult = getDPLOBMult() * getActiveFYMultiplier();
  ['consistent','erratic','intermittent','lumpy'].forEach(key => {
    const c = chartInstances['dp-chart-' + key];
    if (!c) return;
    c.data.datasets[0].data = _dpBaseData[key].map(v => +(v * mult).toFixed(0));
    c.update('none');
  });
}

function updateDemandTrends() {
  const f       = getActiveFilters();
  const fyMult  = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const selPGs  = (!f.lob     || f.lob.length     === 0) ? ['ISG','ESG','HES'] : f.lob;
  const selFYs  = f.fy;      // undefined = no checkbox group; [] = all unchecked; ['FY26'] = specific
  const selQs   = f.quarter; // undefined = no checkbox group; [] = all unchecked; ['Q1'] = specific

  // Helper — apply a clipped slice to a chart
  const applySlice = (chartKey, fullLabels, visIdx, fullSumD) => {
    const c = chartInstances['dp-trend-' + chartKey];
    if (!c) return;
    if (visIdx.length === 0) {
      c.data.labels = []; c.data.datasets[0].data = []; c.data.datasets[1].data = [];
      c.update('none'); return;
    }
    const visLabels = visIdx.map(i => fullLabels[i]);
    const visData   = visIdx.map(i => +(fullSumD[i] * fyMult).toFixed(0));
    const visPct    = visData.map((v, j) =>
      j === 0 ? null : +((v - visData[j-1]) / visData[j-1] * 100).toFixed(1));
    c.data.labels = visLabels;
    c.data.datasets[0].data = visData;
    c.data.datasets[0].backgroundColor = visData.map((_, j) =>
      visPct[j] === null ? 'rgba(144,153,190,0.45)' :
      visPct[j] >= 0     ? 'rgba(22,163,74,0.75)' : 'rgba(220,38,38,0.72)');
    c.data.datasets[1].data = visPct;
    c.update('none');
  };

  // Pre-compute full PG sums (unscaled — fyMult applied inside applySlice)
  const yoySumD = new Array(YOY_FULL_LABELS.length).fill(0);
  const qoqSumD = new Array(QOQ_FULL_LABELS.length).fill(0);
  selPGs.forEach(pg => {
    if (!DP_TREND_PG[pg]) return;
    DP_TREND_PG[pg].yoy.forEach((v, i) => { yoySumD[i] += v; });
    DP_TREND_PG[pg].qoq.forEach((v, i) => { qoqSumD[i] += v; });
  });

  const noFYFilter = !selFYs || selFYs.length === 0;
  const allFYs     = !selFYs || selFYs.length === 3; // all 3 options ticked = show historical context too

  // ── YoY: filter by FY; quarter doesn't apply to annual data ──────────────
  const yoyIdx = noFYFilter
    ? [] // no FY selected → nothing
    : YOY_FY_TAG.map((tag, i) => {
        if (tag === null) return allFYs ? i : -1;  // historical (FY22-24) only when all FYs on
        return selFYs.includes(tag) ? i : -1;
      }).filter(i => i >= 0);
  applySlice('yoy', YOY_FULL_LABELS, yoyIdx, yoySumD);

  // ── QoQ: filter by FY AND Quarter ────────────────────────────────────────
  const noQFilter = !selQs || selQs.length === 0;
  const qoqIdx = (noFYFilter || noQFilter)
    ? []
    : QOQ_FY_TAG.map((fy, i) => {
        const fyOk = fy === 'FY24'
          ? allFYs                       // FY24 historical only when all FYs selected
          : selFYs.includes(fy);
        const qOk  = selQs.includes(QOQ_Q_TAG[i]);
        return (fyOk && qOk) ? i : -1;
      }).filter(i => i >= 0);
  applySlice('qoq', QOQ_FULL_LABELS, qoqIdx, qoqSumD);
}

function resetPageFilters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="fy"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'FY26');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="quarter"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'Q1');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="lob"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'All');
  });
  // Close any open filter dropdowns visually
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown-content.open').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('open'));
  updateFilterChips();
}
const resetDPFilters = resetPageFilters; // backward-compat alias

function applyAllFilteredCharts() {
  updateDPQuadrantCharts();
  updateDemandTrends();
  updateForecastTrendChart();
  updateLOBWeeklyChart();
}

// =========================================================
// RAW DATA TABLE
// =========================================================
let rawSortCol = null, rawSortDir = 1;
let filteredRawData = [...rawData];

function getFilteredRawData() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const search = (document.getElementById('raw-search')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  return rawData.filter(row => {
    if (active.region && !active.region.includes(row.region)) return false;
    if (active.subregion && !active.subregion.includes(row.subregion)) return false;
    if (active.lob && !active.lob.includes(row.lob)) return false;
    if (active.location && !active.location.includes(row.location)) return false;
    if (active.queue && !active.queue.includes(row.queue) && !active.queue.includes(row.br)) return false;
    if (active.fy && !active.fy.includes(row.fy)) return false;
    if (active.quarter && !active.quarter.includes(row.quarter)) return false;
    if (active.month && !active.month.includes(row.month)) return false;
    if (active.week && !active.week.includes(row.week)) return false;
    if (search) {
      const rowStr = Object.values(row).join(' ').toLowerCase();
      if (!rowStr.includes(search)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
}

function renderRawTable() {
  filteredRawData = getFilteredRawData();
  if (rawSortCol) {
    filteredRawData.sort((a,b) => {
      let av = a[rawSortCol], bv = b[rawSortCol];
      if (['weekNum','sr','fasu','tasu','fdsr'].includes(rawSortCol)) { av = Number(av); bv = Number(bv); }
      return av < bv ? -rawSortDir : av > bv ? rawSortDir : 0;
    });
  }
  const tbody = document.getElementById('raw-table-body');
  let html = '';
  filteredRawData.forEach((row, idx) => {
    const good = row.status === 'Within Tolerance';
    html += `<tr>
      <td class="row-num sticky-col">${idx+1}</td>
      <td>${row.region}</td><td>${row.subregion}</td><td>${row.partner}</td>
      <td>${row.location}</td><td>${row.queue}</td><td>${row.br}</td>
      <td>${row.fy}</td><td>${row.quarter}</td><td>${row.month}</td><td>${row.week}</td>
      <td>${row.sr.toLocaleString()}</td><td>${row.fasu.toLocaleString()}</td>
      <td>${row.tasu.toLocaleString()}</td><td>${row.fdsr.toLocaleString()}</td>
      <td>${row.lob}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${good?'badge-good':'badge-high'}">${row.status}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  });
  tbody.innerHTML = html;
  const total = document.getElementById('raw-row-count');
  if (total) total.innerText = `${filteredRawData.length} of ${rawData.length} rows`;
  const drTotal = document.getElementById('dr-total-records');
  if (drTotal) drTotal.innerText = filteredRawData.length.toLocaleString();
}

function sortRawTable(col) {
  const colKeyMap = { region:'region', subregion:'subregion', partner:'partner', location:'location', queue:'queue', busrep:'br', fy:'fy', quarter:'quarter', month:'month', week:'weekNum', sr:'sr', fasu:'fasu', tasu:'tasu', fdsr:'fdsr', lob:'lob' };
  const key = colKeyMap[col] || col;
  if (rawSortCol === key) rawSortDir *= -1;
  else { rawSortCol = key; rawSortDir = 1; }
  renderRawTable();
}

function filterRawTable() { renderRawTable(); }

function exportCSV() {
  const data = filteredRawData.length ? filteredRawData : getFilteredRawData();
  const headers = ['#','Region','Sub-Region','Partner','Location','Queue','Bus Reporting','FY','Quarter','Month','Week','Weekly SR Actuals','Weekly Field ASU','Weekly Tech ASU','Forecast Demand SR','Product Group','Status'];
  const rows = data.map((r,i) => [i+1,r.region,r.subregion,r.partner,r.location,r.queue,r.br,r.fy,r.quarter,r.month,r.week,r.sr,r.fasu,r.tasu,r.fdsr,r.lob,r.status]);
  const csv = [headers, ...rows].map(r => r.map(c => `"${c}"`).join(',')).join('\n');
  const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'isg_bpa_raw_data.csv'; a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

function exportExcel() {
  const data = filteredRawData.length ? filteredRawData : getFilteredRawData();
  const headers = ['#','Region','Sub-Region','Partner','Location','Queue','Bus Reporting','FY','Quarter','Month','Week','Weekly SR Actuals','Weekly Field ASU','Weekly Tech ASU','Forecast Demand SR','Product Group','Status'];
  const rows = data.map((r,i) => [i+1,r.region,r.subregion,r.partner,r.location,r.queue,r.br,r.fy,r.quarter,r.month,r.week,r.sr,r.fasu,r.tasu,r.fdsr,r.lob,r.status]);
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet([headers, ...rows]);
  ws['!cols'] = headers.map(h => ({ wch: Math.max(h.length + 2, 12) }));
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'ISG BPA Raw Data');
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, 'isg_bpa_raw_data.xlsx');
}

// =========================================================
// WHAT-IF SIMULATION MODULE
// =========================================================
// Monthly axis — Feb → Jan (fiscal year)
const WI_MONTHS = ['Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan'];

// Base data matching Lovable screenshots
const WI_BASE = {
  asu:              1350000,
  sr:               587000,
  disp:             233700,
  renewalOppQty:    284500,
  baseRenewalRate:  85.3,
  renewedUnits:     242678,
  newContracts:     73140,
  asuContrib:       612.4e6,
};

// Monthly seasonality indices (Feb → Jan), normalised so average=1
const WI_ASU_SHAPE  = [0.756,0.793,0.831,0.815,0.800,0.808,0.816,0.920,1.020,1.095,1.148,1.125];
const WI_SR_SHAPE   = [0.970,1.020,0.985,0.880,0.815,0.780,0.815,0.969,1.055,1.122,1.156,1.190];
const WI_DISP_SHAPE = [0.850,0.910,0.870,0.800,0.755,0.755,0.800,0.950,1.055,1.105,1.155,1.200];

const WI_SLIDERS = [
  { key:'growth',   label:'New Contracts Growth',  min:-20, max:50,  step:1,   val:8,    fmt: v => (v>=0?'+':'')+v+'%' },
  { key:'renewal',  label:'APOS Renewal Rate',     min:70,  max:100, step:0.5, val:89.5, fmt: v => v.toFixed(1)+'%' },
];

const WI_SAVED_SCENARIOS_DEFAULT = [
  { id:'conservative', label:'Conservative',     renewal:78,   growth:-5,  color:'#6b758f' },
  { id:'expected',     label:'Expected',          renewal:89.5, growth:8,  color:'#9d78f0' },
  { id:'aggressive',   label:'Aggressive',        renewal:94,   growth:28, color:'#22d472' },
  { id:'executive',    label:'Executive Stretch', renewal:97,   growth:38, color:'#4c7ef8' },
  { id:'worst',        label:'Worst Case',        renewal:72,   growth:-18,color:'#f06060' },
];

let wiState = { renewal:89.5, growth:8, unitsOverride:'' };
let wiSavedScenarios = WI_SAVED_SCENARIOS_DEFAULT.map(s => ({...s}));
let wiAuditLog = [];
let wiCharts = {};

function wiN(v) { return v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M':v>=1e3?Math.round(v/1e3)+'K':Math.round(v).toString(); }
function wiNK(v) { return (v/1e3).toFixed(1); } // for chart labels in K
function wiD(v) { return (v>=0?'+':'')+wiN(v); }

function wiCompute(st) {
  const rRate  = st.renewal / 100;
  const baseR  = WI_BASE.baseRenewalRate / 100;
  const gMult  = 1 + (st.growth / 100);
  const asuMult = 1 + (st.growth/100)*0.8 + (rRate/baseR - 1)*0.25;
  const whatifASU  = Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * asuMult);
  const whatifSR   = Math.round(WI_BASE.sr   * (1 + (st.growth/100)*0.7 + (rRate/baseR-1)*0.2));
  const whatifDisp = Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * (1 + (st.growth/100)*0.6 + (rRate/baseR-1)*0.15));
  const renewedUnits   = st.unitsOverride ? (parseInt(st.unitsOverride)||WI_BASE.renewedUnits) : Math.round(WI_BASE.renewalOppQty * rRate);
  const newContracts   = Math.round(WI_BASE.newContracts * gMult);
  const aposRenewals   = Math.round(renewedUnits * 2840);    // $2840 per unit
  const newContractsVal= Math.round(newContracts * 2754);    // $2754 per unit
  return { whatifASU, whatifSR, whatifDisp, renewedUnits, newContracts, aposRenewals, newContractsVal,
           asuDelta: whatifASU - WI_BASE.asu, srDelta: whatifSR - WI_BASE.sr, dispDelta: whatifDisp - WI_BASE.disp,
           growthPct: (whatifASU / WI_BASE.asu - 1) * 100 };
}

function wiRenderKPIs() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const pos = v => v >= 0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)';
  const kpis = [
    { label:'BASE ASU',         val:wiN(WI_BASE.asu),             sub:'+3.2% YoY',          subColor:'var(--green)', icon:'ti-chart-bar' },
    { label:'WHAT-IF ASU',      val:wiN(fc.whatifASU),            sub:`+${fc.growthPct.toFixed(1)}% lift`, subColor:'var(--green)', icon:'ti-chart-arrows' },
    { label:'ASU DELTA',        val:wiD(fc.asuDelta),             sub:'vs baseline',        subColor:pos(fc.asuDelta), icon:'ti-plus-minus' },
    { label:'SERVICE REQUESTS', val:wiN(fc.whatifSR),             sub:wiD(fc.srDelta),      subColor:pos(fc.srDelta),  icon:'ti-headset' },
    { label:'DISPATCHES',       val:wiN(fc.whatifDisp),           sub:wiD(fc.dispDelta),    subColor:pos(fc.dispDelta),icon:'ti-truck' },
    { label:'FORECAST GROWTH',  val:fc.growthPct.toFixed(1)+'%', sub:'blended uplift',     subColor:'var(--green)', icon:'ti-trending-up' },
  ];
  document.getElementById('wi-kpi-row').innerHTML = kpis.map(k => `
    <div class="kpi-card" style="--kpi-color:var(--text-1);">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div class="kpi-label">${k.label}</div>
        <i class="ti ${k.icon}" style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-3);"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-value" style="font-size:22px;color:var(--text-1);">${k.val}</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub" style="color:${k.subColor};margin-top:6px;">
        <i class="ti ti-arrow-up-right" style="font-size:11px;"></i> ${k.sub}
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiRenderSliders() {
  const sliderHTML = WI_SLIDERS.map(s => `
    <div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-1);">${s.label}</label>
        <span id="wi-val-${s.key}" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);">${s.fmt(wiState[s.key])}</span>
      </div>
      <input type="range" min="${s.min}" max="${s.max}" step="${s.step||1}" value="${wiState[s.key]}"
        style="width:100%;accent-color:var(--accent);height:4px;"
        oninput="wiSliderMoved('${s.key}',parseFloat(this.value))">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-3);margin-top:4px;font-family:var(--font-mono);">
        <span>${s.fmt(s.min)}</span><span>${s.fmt(s.max)}</span>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');

  const displayVal = wiState.unitsOverride ? Number(wiState.unitsOverride).toLocaleString('en-IN') : '';
  const textInputHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
      <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:8px;">Renewed Units Override</div>
      <input type="text" id="wi-units-input" value="${displayVal}"
        placeholder="e.g. 2,50,000"
        inputmode="numeric"
        style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-1);font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font-mono);outline:none;letter-spacing:0.02em;"
        onfocus="this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)'" onblur="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)'"
        oninput="wiUnitsInput(this)">
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-3);margin-top:4px;">Leave blank to use calculated value</div>
    </div>`;

  document.getElementById('wi-sliders-area').innerHTML = sliderHTML + textInputHTML;
}

function wiSliderMoved(key, val) {
  wiState[key] = val;
  const s = WI_SLIDERS.find(x => x.key === key);
  document.getElementById('wi-val-' + key).textContent = s.fmt(val);
  // Targeted updates — fast, no full re-render
  wiRenderKPIs();
  wiRenderImpact();
  wiRenderPipeline();
  wiRenderCharts(); // smart: updates existing chart data in-place
  wiAddAudit('Slider', `${s.label} → ${s.fmt(val)}`);
}

function wiUnitsInput(el) {
  // Strip everything except digits
  const digits = el.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
  if (!digits) {
    wiState.unitsOverride = '';
    el.value = '';
    wiRenderKPIs(); wiRenderImpact(); wiRenderPipeline(); wiRenderCharts();
    return;
  }
  const n = parseInt(digits, 10);
  // Format with Indian number system: 5,00,000
  const formatted = n.toLocaleString('en-IN');
  // Preserve cursor at end after reformat
  el.value = formatted;
  wiState.unitsOverride = n;
  wiRenderKPIs(); wiRenderImpact(); wiRenderPipeline(); wiRenderCharts();
  wiAddAudit('Override', `Renewed Units → ${formatted}`);
}

function wiRenderImpact() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const rows = [
    { icon:'ti-trending-up', label:'ASU increase',     val:wiD(fc.asuDelta),  pos:fc.asuDelta>=0 },
    { icon:'ti-headset',     label:'Service Requests',  val:wiD(fc.srDelta),   pos:fc.srDelta>=0 },
    { icon:'ti-truck',       label:'Dispatches',        val:wiD(fc.dispDelta), pos:fc.dispDelta>=0 },
  ];
  document.getElementById('wi-impact-rows').innerHTML = rows.map(r => `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:8px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <div style="width:28px;height:28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">
          <i class="ti ${r.icon}" style="color:#fff;font-size:13px;"></i>
        </div>
        <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;">${r.label}</span>
      </div>
      <span style="color:#fff;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:15px;font-weight:700;">${r.val}</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiRenderPipeline() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const nodes = [
    { label:'NEW CONTRACTS',    val:'$'+wiN(fc.newContractsVal), icon:'ti-file-plus',    grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#3b6fd4,#5b8ff9)' },
    { label:'APOS RENEWALS',    val:'$'+wiN(fc.aposRenewals),   icon:'ti-refresh',       grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#2d52e0,#4c7ef8)' },
    { label:'ASU FORECAST',     val:wiN(fc.whatifASU),           icon:'ti-chart-arrows',  grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0f9488,#14b8a6)' },
    { label:'SERVICE REQUESTS', val:wiN(fc.whatifSR),            icon:'ti-headset',       grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0f9488,#14b8a6)' },
    { label:'DISPATCHES',       val:wiN(fc.whatifDisp),          icon:'ti-truck',         grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1c4ed8,#3b82f6)' },
  ];
  const chevron = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 6px;"><i class="ti ti-chevron-right" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--text-3);"></i></div>`;
  document.getElementById('wi-pipeline').innerHTML = nodes.map((n, i) => `
    ${i > 0 ? chevron : ''}
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:140px;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;background:${n.grad};position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;opacity:0.25;">
        <i class="ti ${n.icon}" style="font-size:28px;color:#fff;"></i>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;">${n.label}</div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">${n.val}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function _wiChartData() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const ratio   = fc.whatifASU  / WI_BASE.asu;
  const srRatio = fc.whatifSR   / WI_BASE.sr;
  const dpRatio = fc.whatifDisp / WI_BASE.disp;
  return {
    asuBase: WI_ASU_SHAPE.map(s  => Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * s  / 12)),
    asuAdj:  WI_ASU_SHAPE.map(s  => Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * s  / 12 * ratio)),
    srBase:  WI_SR_SHAPE.map(s   => Math.round(WI_BASE.sr   * s  / 12 / 1e3)),
    srAdj:   WI_SR_SHAPE.map(s   => parseFloat((WI_BASE.sr  * s  / 12 / 1e3 * srRatio).toFixed(1))),
    dpBase:  WI_DISP_SHAPE.map(s => Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * s  / 12 / 1e3)),
    dpAdj:   WI_DISP_SHAPE.map(s => Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * s  / 12 / 1e3 * dpRatio)),
  };
}

function wiRenderCharts() {
  const d     = _wiChartData();
  const gridC = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';
  const tickC = isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#9099be';
  const baseC = isDark ? '#4b5563' : '#9ca3af';

  // ── Smart update: if charts already exist, only update the What-If dataset ──
  if (wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'] && wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'] && wiCharts['wi-chart-dp']) {
    wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'].data.datasets[1].data = d.asuAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'].update('none');
    wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'].data.datasets[1].data = d.srAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'].update('none');
    wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].data.datasets[1].data = d.dpAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].update('none');
    return;
  }

  // ── First render: create charts from scratch ──
  function mkLine(id, baseD, adjD, adjColor) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return;
    if (wiCharts[id]) wiCharts[id].destroy();
    wiCharts[id] = new Chart(el.getContext('2d'), {
      type: 'line',
      data: { labels: WI_MONTHS, datasets: [
        { label:'Base',    data:baseD, borderColor:baseC, backgroundColor:'transparent',
          borderWidth:1.5, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:4, tension:0.45, fill:false },
        { label:'What-If', data:adjD,  borderColor:adjColor, backgroundColor:adjColor+'18',
          borderWidth:2.5, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, tension:0.45, fill:'-1' },
      ]},
      options: {
        responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
        interaction:{ mode:'index', intersect:false },
        plugins:{
          legend:{ display:false },
          tooltip:{
            backgroundColor: isDark?'#111521':'#fff',
            borderColor:     isDark?'#1d2135':'#dde2f4',
            borderWidth:1,
            titleColor:      isDark?'#e9ecf7':'#0d1020',
            bodyColor:       isDark?'#6b758f':'#5a6280',
            callbacks:{ label: ctx => ` ${ctx.dataset.label}: ${ctx.formattedValue}` }
          }
        },
        scales:{
          x:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10},maxRotation:0}, border:{display:false} },
          y:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10}},               border:{display:false} }
        }
      }
    });
  }

  mkLine('wi-chart-asu', d.asuBase, d.asuAdj, '#3b82f6');
  mkLine('wi-chart-sr',  d.srBase,  d.srAdj,  '#06b6d4');

  // Dispatch — grouped bar
  const dpEl = document.getElementById('wi-chart-dp'); if (!dpEl) return;
  if (wiCharts['wi-chart-dp']) wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].destroy();
  wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'] = new Chart(dpEl.getContext('2d'), {
    type:'bar',
    data:{ labels:WI_MONTHS, datasets:[
      { label:'Base',    data:d.dpBase, backgroundColor:isDark?'rgba(107,114,128,0.5)':'rgba(156,163,175,0.55)', borderRadius:2 },
      { label:'What-If', data:d.dpAdj,  backgroundColor:'#3b82f6cc', borderRadius:2 },
    ]},
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      plugins:{ legend:{ display:false } },
      scales:{
        x:{ grid:{display:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:9},maxRotation:0}, border:{display:false} },
        y:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10}}, border:{display:false} }
      }
    }
  });
}

function wiRenderAIInsights() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const dPct = fc.growthPct.toFixed(1);
  const regions = ['EMEA','Americas','APJ'];
  const topRegion = regions[Math.abs(Math.round(wiState.renewal * 7)) % 3];
  const conf = Math.min(98, Math.round(72 + wiState.renewal/9 + wiState.growth/8));
  document.getElementById('wi-ai-insights').innerHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--blue);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Scenario Analysis</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;">At <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiState.renewal.toFixed(1)}%</strong> renewal rate with <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiState.growth>=0?'+':''}${wiState.growth}%</strong> contracts growth, ASU shifts by <strong style="color:${dPct>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'};">${dPct>=0?'+':''}${dPct}%</strong> vs baseline.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--purple);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Service Demand Signal</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;">Dispatch forecast reaches <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiN(fc.whatifDisp)}</strong> units with <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiN(fc.whatifSR)}</strong> service requests projected. Confidence: <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${conf}%</strong>.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--green);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Regional Opportunity</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;"><strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${topRegion}</strong> shows the highest renewal uplift leverage. Targeting that region adds the most ASU delta per percentage point.</div>
    </div>`;
}

function wiRenderScenarios() {
  document.getElementById('wi-scenario-list').innerHTML = wiSavedScenarios.map(s => `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;"
      onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='${s.color}'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)'"
      onclick="wiLoadScenario('${s.id}')">
      <div style="width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:${s.color};flex-shrink:0;"></div>
      <span style="flex:1;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-1);font-weight:600;">${s.label}</span>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);font-family:var(--font-mono);">R:${s.renewal}% G:${s.growth>=0?'+':''}${s.growth}%</span>
      <button onclick="wiDeleteScenario(event,'${s.id}')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-3);padding:2px;"><i class="ti ti-trash" style="font-size:12px;"></i></button>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiLoadScenario(id) {
  const s = wiSavedScenarios.find(x => x.id === id); if (!s) return;
  ['renewal','growth'].forEach(k => { if (s[k]!==undefined) wiState[k]=s[k]; });
  wiRenderSliders(); wiRenderAll();
  wiAddAudit('Scenario', `Loaded: ${s.label}`);
}

function wiSaveScenario() {
  const id = 'custom_' + Date.now();
  wiSavedScenarios.push({ id, label:'Custom '+(wiSavedScenarios.length+1),
    renewal:wiState.renewal, growth:wiState.growth, color:'#6b758f' });
  wiRenderScenarios(); wiAddAudit('Scenario', 'Saved scenario');
}

function wiDeleteScenario(e, id) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  wiSavedScenarios = wiSavedScenarios.filter(s => s.id !== id);
  wiRenderScenarios();
}

function wiRenderPublishReadiness() {
  const conf = Math.min(99, Math.round(74 + wiState.renewal/9 + wiState.growth/12));
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const items = [
    { l:'Quality Score',    v:conf+'%',             color:'var(--green)' },
    { l:'Approval Status',  v:'Pending',             color:'var(--amber)' },
    { l:'Final ASU',        v:wiN(fc.whatifASU),     color:'var(--blue)' },
    { l:'Final Dispatches', v:wiN(fc.whatifDisp),    color:'var(--purple)' },
  ];
  document.getElementById('wi-publish-readiness').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
      ${items.map(x => `
        <div style="padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;">${x.l}</div>
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:${x.color};">${x.v}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <span style="color:var(--text-2);">Publish Readiness</span>
        <span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-1);">${conf}%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:6px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="height:100%;width:${conf}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--green));border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.4s;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

function wiHandlePublish() {
  wiAddAudit('Publish', 'Forecast published to plan system');
  const b = document.getElementById('wi-pub-btn');
  b.style.background = 'var(--green)'; b.style.color = '#000';
  b.innerHTML = '<i class="ti ti-check"></i> Published!';
  setTimeout(() => {
    b.style.background = 'var(--accent)'; b.style.color = '#fff';
    b.innerHTML = '<i class="ti ti-rocket"></i> Publish';
  }, 2500);
}

function wiAddAudit(action, detail) {
  const now = new Date();
  wiAuditLog.unshift({ action, detail, time: now.toLocaleTimeString() });
  if (wiAuditLog.length > 50) wiAuditLog.pop();
  wiRenderAudit();
}

function wiRenderAudit() {
  const el = document.getElementById('wi-audit-log'); if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = wiAuditLog.slice(0,15).map(a => `
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
      <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue-dim);border:1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0;">AR</div>
      <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
          <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-1);">${a.action}</span>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-3);font-family:var(--font-mono);">${a.time}</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${a.detail}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiExportCSV() {
  alert('CSV export initiated for current scenario comparison.');
}

function wiRenderAll() {
  wiRenderKPIs();
  wiRenderImpact();
  wiRenderPipeline();
  wiRenderCharts();
  wiRenderAIInsights();
  wiRenderScenarios();
  wiRenderPublishReadiness();
  wiRenderAudit();
}

function wiInit() {
  wiRenderSliders();
  wiAddAudit('Session', 'What-If module loaded');
  wiAddAudit('Filter', 'FY 2026 · Q2 · All Regions');
  setTimeout(wiRenderAll, 80);
}

function setRefreshStamp() {
  const now = new Date();
  const s = `Refreshed ${now.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}`;
  const el = document.getElementById('refresh-stamp');
  const hel = document.getElementById('home-refresh-stamp');
  if (el) el.innerText = s;
  if (hel) hel.innerText = s;
}
setRefreshStamp();
setInterval(setRefreshStamp, 60000);
</script>
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     ANIMATION ORCHESTRATOR — entrance + transition choreography
     Layered on top; does not modify existing app logic.
     ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
(function () {
  const RM = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';
  const qs  = (s, r) => (r || document).querySelector(s);
  const qsa = (s, r) => Array.from((r || document).querySelectorAll(s));

  // ── Sleeker Chart.js motion defaults (applies to all charts built later) ──
  if (window.Chart) {
    Chart.defaults.animation = Chart.defaults.animation || {};
    Chart.defaults.animation.duration = 950;
    Chart.defaults.animation.easing = 'easeOutQuart';
    Chart.defaults.animations = Object.assign({}, Chart.defaults.animations, {
      y: { from: (ctx) => (ctx.type === 'data' && ctx.mode === 'default') ? ctx.chart.scales.y.getPixelForValue(0) : undefined }
    });
  }

  // ── Core reveal helper (Web Animations API; clean, no residual transforms) ──
  function reveal(el, opt) {
    if (!el || RM) return;
    opt = opt || {};
    const y = opt.y != null ? opt.y : 14, x = opt.x || 0, sc = opt.scale != null ? opt.scale : 1;
    const dur = opt.dur || 620, delay = opt.delay || 0;
    el.animate(
      [{ opacity: 0, transform: 'translate(' + x + 'px,' + y + 'px) scale(' + sc + ')' },
       { opacity: 1, transform: 'translate(0,0) scale(1)' }],
      { duration: dur, delay: delay, easing: EASE, fill: 'backwards' }
    );
  }
  function stagger(els, opt) {
    opt = opt || {};
    const base = opt.base || 0, step = opt.step || 70, cap = opt.cap != null ? opt.cap : 7;
    els.forEach((el, i) => {
      const k = Math.min(i, cap);
      reveal(el, Object.assign({}, opt, { delay: base + k * step }));
    });
    return base + Math.min(els.length - 1, cap) * step;
  }

  // ── Count-up for numeric KPI values (preserves prefix/suffix + formatting) ──
  function countUp(el, dur, delay) {
    if (!el || RM) return;
    const txt = el.textContent.trim();
    const m = txt.match(/^([^0-9-]*)(-?[\d,]*\.?\d+)(.*)$/);
    if (!m) return;
    const prefix = m[1], suffix = m[3];
    if (/[A-Za-z]/.test(prefix)) return;            // skip labels like "W22"
    const numStr = m[2];
    const hadComma = numStr.indexOf(',') !== -1;
    const decimals = (numStr.split('.')[1] || '').length;
    const target = parseFloat(numStr.replace(/,/g, ''));
    if (!isFinite(target)) return;
    const fmt = (v) => {
      let s = v.toFixed(decimals);
      if (hadComma) s = Number(s).toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: decimals, maximumFractionDigits: decimals });
      return prefix + s + suffix;
    };
    const t0 = performance.now() + (delay || 0);
    const D = dur || 900;
    el.textContent = fmt(0);
    function frame(now) {
      let t = (now - t0) / D;
      if (t < 0) { requestAnimationFrame(frame); return; }
      if (t > 1) t = 1;
      const e = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
      el.textContent = fmt(target * e);
      if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(frame);
      else el.textContent = txt;                    // restore exact original
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  // ── HOME entrance ──
  function animateHome() {
    reveal(qs('.home-status-bar'), { y: -10, dur: 500 });
    reveal(qs('.home-logo'), { y: 0, scale: 0.92, dur: 600, delay: 140 });
    const hero = [qs('.home-eyebrow'), qs('.home-title'), qs('.home-title-sub'), qs('.home-desc')].filter(Boolean);
    stagger(hero, { y: 22, base: 90, step: 95, dur: 720 });
    reveal(qs('.tiles-label'), { y: 14, delay: 420, dur: 600 });
    stagger(qsa('.tile'), { y: 26, scale: 0.985, base: 500, step: 80, dur: 700 });
  }

  // ── DASHBOARD chrome entrance (header + side panels) ──
  function animateChrome() {
    reveal(qs('.dash-header'), { y: -18, x: 0, dur: 540 });
    reveal(qs('#left-panel'),  { x: -26, y: 0, dur: 640, delay: 70 });
    reveal(qs('#right-panel'), { x: 26,  y: 0, dur: 640, delay: 70 });
  }

  // ── PAGE content reveal (KPI cards stagger + count-up, then chart cards) ──
  function animatePage(pageEl) {
    if (!pageEl || RM) return;
    const kpis = qsa('.kpi-card', pageEl);
    const kEnd = stagger(kpis, { y: 18, scale: 0.985, base: 70, step: 72, dur: 580 });
    kpis.forEach((c, i) => {
      const v = qs('.kpi-value', c);
      countUp(v, 900, 70 + Math.min(i, 7) * 72 + 140);
    });
    const cards = qsa('.visual-card', pageEl);
    stagger(cards, { y: 26, base: (kpis.length ? kEnd + 130 : 80), step: 90, dur: 660 });
  }

  // ── Observe view + page transitions (decoupled from app logic) ──
  function setup() {
    const home = qs('#home-view');
    const dash = qs('#dashboard-view');

    let dashShown = false;
    new MutationObserver(() => {
      const vis = dash && getComputedStyle(dash).display !== 'none';
      if (vis && !dashShown) { dashShown = true; animateChrome(); }
      else if (!vis) { dashShown = false; }
      if (home && getComputedStyle(home).display !== 'none' && home.dataset.seen === '1') {
        animateHome();   // returning home via goHome()
      }
    }).observe(dash, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] });

    // Watch every page-section: animate the one that becomes .active
    qsa('.page-section').forEach((sec) => {
      new MutationObserver((muts) => {
        for (const mu of muts) {
          if (sec.classList.contains('active') && sec.dataset.anim !== 'busy') {
            sec.dataset.anim = 'busy';
            animatePage(sec);
            setTimeout(() => { sec.dataset.anim = ''; }, 50);
          }
        }
      }).observe(sec, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
    });

    // Initial home entrance
    if (home) { home.dataset.seen = '1'; animateHome(); }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setup);
  else setup();
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

info_BPA.html.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>ISG BPA: Business Planning and Analytics</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@3.19.0/dist/tabler-icons.min.css">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg:          #f0f3fc;
      --surface:     #ffffff;
      --card:        #ffffff;
      --card-hi:     #eef1fc;
      --border:      #dde2f4;
      --border-hi:   #b4bde8;
      --text-1:      #0d1020;
      --text-2:      #5a6280;
      --text-3:      #9099be;
      --accent:      #3a6ef0;
      --accent-glow: rgba(58,110,240,0.12);
      --accent-dim:  rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --blue:        #3a6ef0;
      --blue-dim:    rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --green:       #16a34a;
      --green-dim:   rgba(22,163,74,0.09);
      --red:         #dc2626;
      --red-dim:     rgba(220,38,38,0.09);
      --amber:       #b45309;
      --amber-dim:   rgba(180,83,9,0.09);
      --purple:      #6d28d9;
      --nav-bg:      #ffffff;
      --nav-hover:   #eef1fc;
      --font-ui:     'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
      --font-mono:   'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html, body { height: 100%; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text-1);
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      overflow: hidden;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }
    /* Uniform theme transition across all structural surfaces */
    .left-panel, .right-panel, .dash-header, .home-status-bar,
    .home-hero, .tiles-section, .kpi-card, .visual-card, .tile,
    .accordion-header, .nav-link, .btn-icon, .btn-sm,
    .filter-dropdown-btn, .filter-dropdown-content, .filter-checkbox,
    .filter-header, .filter-search-input, .table-search,
    .data-table th, .data-table td, .channel-tab,
    .chip, .badge, .sev-btn, .export-btn, .reset-btn,
    .page-row, .home-banner, .home-hero::before {
      transition: background 0.3s, background-color 0.3s,
                  border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }

    /* ── VIEWS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #home-view      { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; }
    #dashboard-view { display: none; height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; }

    /* ── HOME: TOP STATUS BAR ──────────────────────────────── */
    .home-status-bar {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 9px 36px;
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pulse-dot {
      width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green); flex-shrink: 0;
      animation: pulse-ring 2.2s ease-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse-ring {
      0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,212,114,0.55); }
      70%  { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(34,212,114,0); }
