          <div class="filter-dropdown-btn" onclick="toggleDropdown(this)"><span>Location Name</span><i class="ti ti-chevron-down"></i></div>
          <div class="filter-dropdown-content">
            <input type="text" class="inner-search" placeholder="Search location…" oninput="filterInner(this)">
            <div class="check-list">
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="New York Hub" onchange="onFilterChange()"> New York Hub</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="London HQ" onchange="onFilterChange()"> London HQ</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="Tokyo Base" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Tokyo Base</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="location" value="Austin DC" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Austin DC</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-dropdown" data-filter="queue">
          <div class="filter-dropdown-btn" onclick="toggleDropdown(this)"><span>Queue & Bus Reporting</span><i class="ti ti-chevron-down"></i></div>
          <div class="filter-dropdown-content">
            <div class="check-list">
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="Queue_Alpha" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Queue_Alpha</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="Queue_Beta" onchange="onFilterChange()"> Queue_Beta</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="BR_Direct" onchange="onFilterChange()"> BR_Direct</label>
              <label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="queue" value="BR_Indirect" onchange="onFilterChange()"> BR_Indirect</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="filter-footer">
        <button class="reset-btn" onclick="resetFilters()"><i class="ti ti-refresh"></i> Reset All Filters</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// =========================================================
// DATA GENERATION
// =========================================================
const REGIONS = ['AMER','AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
const SUBREGIONS = {
  'AMER': ['North America','LATAM'],
  'EMEA': ['Western Europe','Eastern Europe'],
  'APJ': ['SEA','ANZ','Japan']
};
const PARTNERS = ['Dell','OSP'];
const LOCATIONS = ['New York Hub','London HQ','Tokyo Base','Austin DC','Sydney Office','Paris HQ'];
const QUEUES = ['Queue_Alpha','Queue_Beta','Queue_Delta'];
const BRS = ['BR_Direct','BR_Indirect'];
const LOBS = ['ISG','ESG','HES'];

function randInt(min, max) { return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min; }
function randFrom(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)]; }
function randFloat(min, max, dec=1) { return parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(dec)); }

let rawData = [];
function generateRawData() {
  rawData = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
    const region = randFrom(REGIONS);
    const subregion = randFrom(SUBREGIONS[region]);
    const partner = randFrom(PARTNERS);
    const location = randFrom(LOCATIONS);
    const queue = randFrom(QUEUES);
    const br = randFrom(BRS);
    const r2 = Math.random();
    const fy = r2 > 0.55 ? 'FY26' : r2 > 0.25 ? 'FY27' : 'FY25';
    const quarter = randFrom(['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4']);
    const month = randFrom(['M1','M2','M3','M4','M5','M6']);
    const weekNum = randInt(1, 52);
    const week = `W${weekNum}`;
    const sr = randInt(1000, 8000);
    const fasu = randInt(2000, 12000);
    const tasu = randInt(500, 6000);
    const fdsr = randInt(1000, 9000);
    const lob = randFrom(LOBS);
    const diff = Math.abs(sr - fdsr);
    const pct = diff / fdsr;
    const status = pct < 0.1 ? 'Within Tolerance' : 'Out of Bounds';
    rawData.push({ i: i+1, region, subregion, partner, location, queue, br, fy, quarter, month, week, weekNum, sr, fasu, tasu, fdsr, lob, status });
  }
}
generateRawData();

const ALERTS_DATA = [
  { sev:'High', desc:'ASU variance exceeds 10% tolerance threshold', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Missing data for LOB: Field Services W44', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Forecast demand drop >15% for Care queue — APJ', date:'2026-06-03', region:'APJ', subregion:'SEA' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Tech ASU weekly actuals below threshold — W22', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'LATAM' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Partner SLA breach — OSP dispatch >48hr', date:'2026-06-04', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Partner Dell SLA missed warning', date:'2026-06-01', region:'APJ', subregion:'ANZ' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Data completeness dropped to 94% — Austin DC', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Queue_Beta backlog growing — 3 consecutive weeks', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'MDR >8% sustained for Tokyo Base — review needed', date:'2026-05-30', region:'APJ', subregion:'Japan' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Forecast model retrain scheduled — W26', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Minor duplicate records detected — 43 rows', date:'2026-05-29', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'New York Hub location data lag — 2hr delay observed', date:'2026-06-04', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
];

// =========================================================
// THEME
// =========================================================
let isDark = false;
function updateChartTheme(chart) {
  const grid  = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';
  const ticks = isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280';
  if (!chart.options.scales) return;
  Object.values(chart.options.scales).forEach(s => {
    if (s.grid)  s.grid.color  = grid;
    if (s.ticks) s.ticks.color = ticks;
  });
}

// =========================================================
// MODULE CONFIG
// =========================================================
const modules = {
  'data-raw': { title: 'Data Management', pages: [{ id: 'dr-page-raw', label: 'Full Raw View' }] },
  'demand-profiling': { title: 'Actuals Profiling', pages: [
    { id: 'dp-page-overview', label: 'Profiling Overview' },
    { id: 'dp-page-trends',   label: 'Demand Trends' }
  ]},
  'forecast-accuracy': { title: 'Forecast Accuracy', pages: [
    { id: 'fa-page-forecast-trend', label: 'Forecast Trend' }
  ]},
  'demand-alerts': { title: 'Demand Planning Alerts', pages: [{ id: 'da-page-log', label: 'Alerts Log' }] },
  'whatif': { title: 'What-If Simulation', pages: [
    { id: 'wi-page-sim',       label: 'Simulation Controls' },
    { id: 'wi-page-scenarios', label: 'Scenario Playground' },
    { id: 'wi-page-publish',   label: 'Forecast Publish' }
  ]}
};

let activeModule = '';
let activePageLabel = '';

function openDashboard(moduleId) {
  activeModule = moduleId;
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'none';
  const dv = document.getElementById('dashboard-view');
  dv.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('dash-title').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;
  document.getElementById('bc-module').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;

  document.querySelectorAll('.module-section').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId).classList.add('active');

  const navContainer = document.getElementById('left-nav-links');
  navContainer.innerHTML = '';
  modules[moduleId].pages.forEach((page, idx) => {
    const link = document.createElement('div');
    link.className = 'nav-link' + (idx === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    link.innerText = page.label;
    link.onclick = () => switchPage(page.id, link, moduleId, page.label);
    navContainer.appendChild(link);
  });

  if (modules[moduleId].pages.length > 0) {
    const first = modules[moduleId].pages[0];
    switchPage(first.id, navContainer.firstChild, moduleId, first.label);
  }

  updateFilterChips();
  const filterBtn = document.getElementById('filter-toggle-btn');
  if (filterBtn) filterBtn.style.display = moduleId === 'whatif' ? 'none' : '';
  if (moduleId === 'whatif') {
    if (!document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.contains('collapsed')) {
      document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.add('collapsed');
    }
    setTimeout(wiInit, 80);
  } else { setTimeout(initCharts, 80); }
}

function goHome() {
  document.getElementById('dashboard-view').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'flex';
}

function switchPage(pageId, linkEl, moduleId, label) {
  const moduleEl = document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId);
  moduleEl.querySelectorAll('.page-section').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('left-nav-links').querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(pageId).classList.add('active');
  linkEl.classList.add('active');
  activePageLabel = label;

  const bcPage = document.getElementById('bc-page');
  const bcSep = document.querySelector('.bc-page-sep');
  bcPage.innerText = label;
  bcSep.style.display = 'inline';

  // Always reset filters on any page switch
  resetPageFilters();

  if (pageId === 'dr-page-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (pageId === 'da-page-log') renderAlerts('all');
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-actuals')        generateActualsTable();
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-partner')        generatePartnerTable();
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-sim')       { setTimeout(wiRenderAll, 60); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-scenarios') { wiRenderAIInsights(); wiRenderScenarios(); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-publish')   { wiRenderPublishReadiness(); wiRenderAudit(); }
  if (pageId === 'dp-page-overview' || pageId === 'dp-page-trends') {
    updateDPQuadrantCharts();
    updateDemandTrends();
  }
}

// =========================================================
// PANEL TOGGLES
// =========================================================
function toggleLeftPanel() { document.getElementById('left-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleRightPanel() { document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleAccordion(el) {
  const content = el.nextElementSibling;
  const icon = el.querySelector('i');
  content.classList.toggle('active');
  icon.className = content.classList.contains('active') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}
function toggleDropdown(btn) {
  btn.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open');
  const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
  icon.className = btn.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('open') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER INNER SEARCH
// =========================================================
function filterInner(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  const labels = input.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('label');
  labels.forEach(l => l.style.display = l.textContent.toUpperCase().includes(q) ? '' : 'none');
}
function searchFilters(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown').forEach(dd => {
    const label = dd.querySelector('.filter-dropdown-btn span').textContent.toUpperCase();
    dd.style.display = label.includes(q) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

// =========================================================
// WEEK CHECKBOXES
// =========================================================
const weekList = document.getElementById('week-check-list');
let wHtml = '<label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="week" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>';
for (let i = 1; i <= 52; i++) {
  wHtml += `<label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="week" value="W${i}" onchange="onFilterChange()"> W${i}</label>`;
}
weekList.innerHTML = wHtml;

// =========================================================
// FILTER DEFAULTS
// =========================================================
const DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES = {};
function captureDefaults() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key] = cb.checked;
  });
}
setTimeout(captureDefaults, 100);

function resetFilters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    if (key in DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES) cb.checked = DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key];
    else cb.checked = false;
  });
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = 'FY26 · All Regions';
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER CHIPS
// =========================================================
function getActiveFilters() {
  const groupState = {};
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const group = cb.dataset.group;
    if (!group) return;
    if (!groupState[group]) groupState[group] = { allChecked: false, values: [] };
    if (cb.value === 'All') { if (cb.checked) groupState[group].allChecked = true; }
    else if (cb.checked) groupState[group].values.push(cb.value);
  });
  const active = {};
  Object.entries(groupState).forEach(([group, state]) => {
    if (!state.allChecked) active[group] = state.values;
  });
  return active;
}

function updateFilterChips() {
  const row = document.getElementById('filter-chips-row');
  row.innerHTML = '';
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  Object.entries(active).forEach(([group, values]) => {
    values.forEach(v => {
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'chip';
      chip.innerHTML = `<i class="ti ti-x" style="font-size:9px;"></i> ${group}: ${v}`;
      chip.title = 'Click to remove';
      chip.onclick = () => {
        const cb = document.querySelector(`#filter-container input[data-group="${group}"][value="${v}"]`);
        if (cb) { cb.checked = false; onFilterChange(); }
      };
      row.appendChild(chip);
    });
  });
  const fyChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="fy"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const regionChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="region"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const fyText = fyChecked.length ? fyChecked.join(', ') : 'All FY';
  const regionText = regionChecked.length ? regionChecked.join(', ') : 'All Regions';
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = `${fyText} · ${regionText}`;
}

function onFilterChange() {
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// =========================================================
// DATA UPDATE
// =========================================================
const FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS = new Set([
  'fa-chart-hbar','fa-chart-partner',
  'dp-chart-consistent','dp-chart-erratic','dp-chart-intermittent','dp-chart-lumpy'
]);

function triggerDataUpdate() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.kpi-dynamic:not(#dr-total-records):not(#da-total)').forEach(el => {
    let t = el.innerText.trim();
    if (t.startsWith('+') || t.startsWith('-')) return;
    let isP = t.includes('%'), isK = t.includes('K'), isM = t.endsWith('M');
    let n = parseFloat(t.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
    if (isNaN(n) || n === 0) return;
    let v = n * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.1 - 0.05));
    if (isP) {
      v = Math.max(0, Math.min(99.9, v));
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(1) + '%';
    } else if (isM) {
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(2) + 'M';
    } else if (isK) {
      el.innerText = v.toFixed(1) + 'K';
    } else {
      el.innerText = Math.round(Math.max(0, v)).toLocaleString('en-IN');
    }
  });
  if (activeModule === 'data-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (activeModule === 'demand-alerts') renderAlerts(currentAlertFilter);
  if (activeModule === 'forecast-accuracy') { generateActualsTable(); generatePartnerTable(); }
  Object.entries(chartInstances).forEach(([id, c]) => {
    if (!c || FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS.has(id)) return;
    c.data.datasets.forEach(ds => {
      ds.data = ds.data.map(v => Math.max(10, v * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.3 - 0.15))));
    });
    c.update();
  });
  applyAllFilteredCharts();
}

// =========================================================
// CHARTS
// =========================================================
Chart.defaults.color = '#5a6280';
Chart.defaults.font.family = "'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif";
const chartInstances = {};

function gridColor() { return isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'; }
function axisColor() { return isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280'; }

function baseLineOptions(stacked = false) {
  return {
    responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: axisColor(), boxWidth: 12, font: { size: 11 } } } },
    scales: {
      x: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } },
      y: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } }
    }
  };
}

function switchChartType(chartId, newType, btnEl) {
  const chart = chartInstances[chartId];
  if (!chart) return;
  chart.config.type = newType;
  chart.update();
  btnEl.closest('.chart-toggle').querySelectorAll('.chart-toggle-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btnEl.classList.add('active');
}

function initCharts() {
  Object.values(chartInstances).forEach(c => { if (c) c.destroy(); });
  Object.keys(chartInstances).forEach(k => delete chartInstances[k]);

  function mk(id, type, data, options) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el.getContext('2d'), { type, data, options: options || baseLineOptions() });
  }

  initForecastTrendChart();
  initDemandProfilingQuadrants();
  initDemandTrends();
  applyAllFilteredCharts();
}

// =========================================================
// ACTUALS PROFILING — 4-QUADRANT DEMAND CLASSIFICATION
// =========================================================
function initDemandProfilingQuadrants() {
  const MONTHS = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
  const labels = [];
  for (let y = 2016; y <= 2022; y++) {
    MONTHS.forEach(m => labels.push(m + ' ' + y));
  }

  function seeded(seed) {
    let s = seed;
    return () => { s = (s * 16807 + 0) % 2147483647; return (s - 1) / 2147483646; };
  }

  const rC = seeded(42);
  const consistent = labels.map((_, i) => {
    const seasonal = Math.sin((i / 12) * 2 * Math.PI - 1) * 18e6;
    return +(Math.max(18e6, 38e6 + seasonal + i * 180000 + (rC() - 0.5) * 4e6)).toFixed(0);
  });

  const rE = seeded(77);
  const erratic = labels.map(() => +((0.3 + rE() * 4.5) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  const rI = seeded(13);
  const intermittent = labels.map(() => rI() < 0.45 ? 0 : +((1.2 + rI() * 2.3) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  const rL = seeded(99);
  const lumpy = labels.map(() => rL() < 0.68 ? 0 : +((0.05 + rL() * 0.43) * 1e6).toFixed(0));

  _dpBaseData = { consistent, erratic, intermittent, lumpy };

  const mkQ = (id, color, data, yMax, yStep) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    if (chartInstances[id]) { chartInstances[id].destroy(); delete chartInstances[id]; }
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el, {
      type: 'line',
      data: { labels, datasets: [{ data, borderColor: color, backgroundColor: 'transparent', fill: false }] },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: { callbacks: { title: ctx => ctx[0].label, label: ctx => ' ' + (ctx.raw/1e6).toFixed(2) + 'M' } }
        },
        scales: {
          x: {
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: {
              color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, maxTicksLimit: 8,
              callback: function(val, i) {
                return labels[i] && labels[i].startsWith('Jan') ? labels[i].split(' ')[1] : '';
              }
            }
          },
          y: {
            min: 0, max: yMax,
            grid: { color: gridColor() },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, stepSize: yStep, callback: v => (v/1e6).toFixed(0)+'M' }
          }
        },
        elements: { point: { radius: 0 }, line: { tension: 0.35, borderWidth: 1.5 } }
      }
    });
  };

  mkQ('dp-chart-consistent',   '#16a34a', consistent,   72e6,   18e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-erratic',      '#d97706', erratic,       5.5e6,  1e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-intermittent', '#2563eb', intermittent,  4e6,    1e6);
  mkQ('dp-chart-lumpy',        '#db2777', lumpy,         0.6e6,  0.15e6);
}

function initDemandTrends() {
  const yoyLabels = ['FY22','FY23','FY24','FY25','FY26 YTD'];
  const yoyDemand = [985000,1048000,1108000,1179000,1257000];
  const yoyPct    = [null,6.4,5.7,6.4,6.6];

  const qoqLabels = ['Q3 FY24','Q4 FY24','Q1 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q4 FY25','Q1 FY26','Q2 FY26'];
  const qoqDemand = [284000,298000,306000,294000,315000,308000,325000,338000];
  const qoqPct    = [null,4.9,2.7,-3.9,7.1,-2.2,5.5,4.0];

  const mkTrend = (id, labels, demand, pct, lineColor) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    if (chartInstances[id]) { chartInstances[id].destroy(); delete chartInstances[id]; }
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el, {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels,
        datasets: [
          {
            type: 'bar',
            label: 'Demand',
            data: demand,
            backgroundColor: demand.map((_, i) =>
              pct[i] === null ? 'rgba(144,153,190,0.45)' :
              pct[i] >= 0    ? 'rgba(22,163,74,0.75)' :
                               'rgba(220,38,38,0.72)'),
            borderRadius: 4,
            borderSkipped: false,
            yAxisID: 'y'
          },
          {
            type: 'line',
            label: '% Change',
            data: pct,
            borderColor: lineColor,
            backgroundColor: 'transparent',
            borderWidth: 2,
            borderDash: [5, 3],
            pointRadius: 3,
            pointBackgroundColor: lineColor,
            pointBorderWidth: 0,
            spanGaps: false,
            tension: 0.3,
            yAxisID: 'y1'
          }
        ]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          tooltip: {
            callbacks: {
              label: ctx => {
                if (ctx.dataset.label === 'Demand') {
                  const v = ctx.raw >= 1e6 ? (ctx.raw/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M' : (ctx.raw/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K';
                  return ' Demand: ' + v;
                }
                if (ctx.raw === null || ctx.raw === undefined) return ' Change: —';
                return ' Change: ' + (ctx.raw >= 0 ? '+' : '') + ctx.raw.toFixed(1) + '%';
              }
            }
          }
        },
        scales: {
          x: {
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 } }
          },
          y: {
            position: 'left', min: 0,
            grid: { color: gridColor() },
            ticks: {
              color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 },
              callback: v => v >= 1e6 ? (v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M' : v >= 1e3 ? (v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K' : v
            }
          },
          y1: {
            position: 'right',
            grid: { display: false },
            ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 8.5 }, callback: v => v + '%' }
          }
        }
      }
    });
  };

  // Initialize with empty data — updateDemandTrends() applies the correct filtered state immediately after
  mkTrend('dp-trend-yoy', [], [], [], '#b45309');
  mkTrend('dp-trend-qoq', [], [], [], '#0891b2');
}

// =========================================================
// FORECAST TREND — SR ACTUALS / FORECAST / ADJUSTED FORECAST
// =========================================================
function _ftUpdateKPIs(scaledActuals, scaledForecast, scaledAdj, errors, weeks, TODAY_IDX) {
  // Right-panel stat tiles (still present in the error chart section)
  const elMape = document.getElementById('ft-mape');
  const elBias = document.getElementById('ft-bias');
  const elBest = document.getElementById('ft-best-week');
  const elWrst = document.getElementById('ft-worst-week');

  // Top KPI cards
  const elCW      = document.getElementById('ft-current-week');
  const elCWSub   = document.getElementById('ft-current-week-sub');
  const elASU     = document.getElementById('ft-asu-acc');
  const elASUSub  = document.getElementById('ft-asu-acc-sub');
  const elSR      = document.getElementById('ft-sr-acc');
  const elSRSub   = document.getElementById('ft-sr-acc-sub');
  const elDSP     = document.getElementById('ft-dsp-acc');
  const elDSPSub  = document.getElementById('ft-dsp-acc-sub');

  const curWeekLabel = weeks[TODAY_IDX] || 'W22';
  if (elCW)    elCW.innerText    = curWeekLabel;
  if (elCWSub) elCWSub.innerText = 'FY26 · Actuals through here';

  if (errors.length) {
    const absErr  = errors.map(Math.abs);
    const mapeVal = absErr.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / absErr.length;
    const mapeStr = mapeVal.toFixed(1) + '%';
    const rawBias = errors.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0) / errors.length;
    const biasStr = (rawBias >= 0 ? '+' : '') + rawBias.toFixed(1) + '%';
    const minI    = absErr.indexOf(Math.min(...absErr));
    const maxI    = absErr.indexOf(Math.max(...absErr));

    // Right-panel stat tiles
    if (elMape) elMape.innerText = mapeStr;
    if (elBias) { elBias.innerText = biasStr; elBias.style.color = Math.abs(rawBias)<2?'var(--green)':rawBias>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)'; }
    if (elBest) elBest.innerText = weeks[minI] || '—';
    if (elWrst) elWrst.innerText = weeks[maxI] || '—';

    // KPI card accuracy values
    // SR accuracy derived from SR error data; ASU & Dispatch use calibrated base values
    const fyMult  = getActiveFYMultiplier();
    const srAcc   = Math.min(99.9, 100 - mapeVal);
    const asuAcc  = Math.min(99.9, 95.4 + (fyMult - 1.0) * 1.8);
    const dspAcc  = Math.min(99.9, 97.1 + (fyMult - 1.0) * 1.2);
    const accColor = v => v >= 95 ? 'var(--green)' : v >= 90 ? 'var(--amber)' : 'var(--red)';
    const periodSub = 'Overall · ' + (weeks[0]||'W01') + '–' + curWeekLabel;

    if (elASU)    { elASU.innerText    = asuAcc.toFixed(1) + '%'; elASU.style.color = accColor(asuAcc); }
    if (elASUSub)   elASUSub.innerText = periodSub;
    if (elSR)     { elSR.innerText     = srAcc.toFixed(1)  + '%'; elSR.style.color  = accColor(srAcc);  }
    if (elSRSub)    elSRSub.innerText  = periodSub;
    if (elDSP)    { elDSP.innerText    = dspAcc.toFixed(1) + '%'; elDSP.style.color = accColor(dspAcc); }
    if (elDSPSub)   elDSPSub.innerText = periodSub;
  }
}

function initForecastTrendChart() {
  const TODAY_IDX = 21;
  const weeks = Array.from({length:52}, (_,i) => 'W'+String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'));
  function seeded(s) { return ()=>{ s=(s*16807)%2147483647; return (s-1)/2147483646; }; }
  const rA=seeded(42), rF=seeded(77), rAd=seeded(13), rP=seeded(88);

  const actuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((612000-i*1700)+(rA()-0.5)*36000));
  const lastActual = actuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const forecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if (i<TODAY_IDX) return null;
    const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? lastActual : Math.round((lastActual-d*1100)+(rF()-0.5)*16000);
  });
  const adjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if (i<TODAY_IDX) return null;
    const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? lastActual : Math.round((lastActual-d*580+9000)+(rAd()-0.5)*10000);
  });
  const planForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round(607000+(rP()-0.5)*22000));
  // ── ASU data ── (weekly ~295K, gentle growth)
  const rAsu1=seeded(101), rAsu2=seeded(102), rAsu3=seeded(103);
  const asuActuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((295000+i*220)+(rAsu1()-0.5)*17000));
  const asuLast = asuActuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const asuForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? asuLast : Math.round((asuLast+d*160)+(rAsu2()-0.5)*7500);
  });
  const asuAdjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? asuLast : Math.round((asuLast+d*90+3800)+(rAsu3()-0.5)*4800);
  });

  // ── Dispatch data ── (weekly ~6200, slight decline)
  const rDsp1=seeded(201), rDsp2=seeded(202), rDsp3=seeded(203);
  const dspActuals = weeks.map((_,i) => i>TODAY_IDX ? null : Math.round((6200-i*14)+(rDsp1()-0.5)*580));
  const dspLast = dspActuals[TODAY_IDX];
  const dspForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? dspLast : Math.round((dspLast-d*11)+(rDsp2()-0.5)*380);
  });
  const dspAdjForecast = weeks.map((_,i) => {
    if(i<TODAY_IDX) return null; const d=i-TODAY_IDX;
    return i===TODAY_IDX ? dspLast : Math.round((dspLast-d*7+90)+(rDsp3()-0.5)*260);
  });

  _ftMetricData = {
    sr:       { actuals, forecast, adjForecast },
    asu:      { actuals: asuActuals, forecast: asuForecast, adjForecast: asuAdjForecast },
    dispatch: { actuals: dspActuals, forecast: dspForecast, adjForecast: dspAdjForecast }
  };
  _ftBaseData = { actuals, forecast, adjForecast, planForecast, weeks, TODAY_IDX };

  const mult = getDPLOBMult() * getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const sA  = actuals.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sF  = forecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sAd = adjForecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const errWeeks = weeks.slice(0,TODAY_IDX+1);
  const errors = errWeeks.map((_,i) => {
    const v=actuals[i], p=planForecast[i];
    return (v==null||p==null) ? null : +((p*mult-v*mult)/(v*mult)*100).toFixed(1);
  }).filter(v=>v!=null);

  // ── Main SR trend chart ──────────────────────────────────
  const mainId='fa-chart-forecast-trend';
  const mainEl=document.getElementById(mainId);
  if (chartInstances[mainId]) { chartInstances[mainId].destroy(); delete chartInstances[mainId]; }

  const vertDivider = {
    id:'ft_divider',
    afterDraw(chart) {
      if (chart.canvas.id!==mainId) return;
      const {ctx,chartArea:{top,bottom},scales:{x}}=chart; if(!x) return;
      const px=x.getPixelForValue(TODAY_IDX);
      ctx.save();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.setLineDash([5,4]);
      ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
      ctx.moveTo(px,top); ctx.lineTo(px,bottom); ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]);
      const lbl='▶ Current Week'; ctx.font='500 9px "Plus Jakarta Sans",sans-serif';
      const tw=ctx.measureText(lbl).width;
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.1)';
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(px+5,top+4,tw+10,16,4); ctx.fill();
      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(58,110,240,0.85)'; ctx.fillText(lbl,px+10,top+15);
      ctx.restore();
    }
  };

  const aopVal = getAOPTargetValue(); // always the raw FY target, no LOB scaling
  const sAOP   = weeks.map(() => aopVal);

  if (mainEl) chartInstances[mainId] = new Chart(mainEl, {
    type:'line', plugins:[vertDivider],
    data:{ labels:weeks, datasets:[
      { label:'Actuals',           data:sA,   borderColor:'#3a6ef0', backgroundColor:'rgba(58,110,240,0.07)', borderWidth:2,   fill:true,  tension:0.35, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'Forecast',          data:sF,   borderColor:'#16a34a', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2.5, borderDash:[8,4],  tension:0.4,  pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'Adjusted Forecast', data:sAd,  borderColor:'#d97706', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2.5, borderDash:[3,3],  tension:0.4,  pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, spanGaps:false },
      { label:'AOP Target',        data:sAOP, borderColor:'#6366f1', backgroundColor:'transparent',           borderWidth:2,   borderDash:[10,4], tension:0,    pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:3, spanGaps:true  }
    ]},
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
      plugins:{
        legend:{display:false},
        tooltip:{
          backgroundColor:'#fff',borderColor:'#dde2f4',borderWidth:1,
          titleColor:'#5a6280',bodyColor:'#0d1020',padding:10,
          callbacks:{
            title:ctx=>'FY26 · '+ctx[0].label,
            label:ctx=>ctx.raw==null?null:' '+ctx.dataset.label+': '+ctx.raw.toLocaleString('en-IN'),
            afterBody:ctx=>{
              const a=ctx.find(c=>c.dataset.label==='Actuals'), f=ctx.find(c=>c.dataset.label==='Forecast');
              if(a&&f&&a.raw!=null&&f.raw!=null){
                const d=((f.raw-a.raw)/a.raw*100).toFixed(1);
                return[' ─────────────',' Fcst vs Actual: '+(d>=0?'+':'')+d+'%'];
              }
              return[];
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales:{
        x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:axisColor(),font:{size:9},maxTicksLimit:14,callback(v,i){return i%4===0?weeks[i]?weeks[i]:''?'':''?'':weeks[i]:''}}},
        y:{grid:{color:gridColor()},min:0,ticks:{color:axisColor(),font:{size:9},callback:v=>v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v}}
      }
    }
  });

  initLOBWeeklyChart();
  _ftUpdateKPIs(sA, sF, sAd, errors, errWeeks, TODAY_IDX);
}

function updateForecastTrendChart() {
  if (!_ftBaseData) return;
  const {actuals,forecast,adjForecast,planForecast,weeks,TODAY_IDX}=_ftBaseData;
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  const mult = hideAll ? 0 : getDPLOBMult()*getActiveFYMultiplier();

  // Use current metric data
  const md = _ftMetricData[_ftMetric] || { actuals, forecast, adjForecast };
  const sA =hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.actuals.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sF =hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.forecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);
  const sAd=hideAll ? weeks.map(()=>null) : md.adjForecast.map(v=>v!=null?Math.round(v*mult):null);

  // Errors always from SR data for stat tiles (unchanged)
  const errWeeks=weeks.slice(0,TODAY_IDX+1);
  const errors=hideAll ? [] : errWeeks.map((_,i)=>{
    const v=actuals[i],p=planForecast[i];
    return (v==null||p==null)?null:+((p*mult-v*mult)/(v*mult)*100).toFixed(1);
  }).filter(v=>v!=null);

  // AOP always visible — metric-aware target, no filter gating
  const aopVal = getAOPTargetValue();
  const mc=chartInstances['fa-chart-forecast-trend'];
  if(mc){
    mc.data.datasets[0].data=sA;
    mc.data.datasets[1].data=sF;
    mc.data.datasets[2].data=sAd;
    mc.data.datasets[3].data=weeks.map(()=>aopVal);
    mc.options.scales.y.ticks.callback = (FT_METRIC_CONF[_ftMetric]||FT_METRIC_CONF.sr).yFmt;
    mc.update('none');
  }
  _ftUpdateKPIs(sA,sF,sAd,errors,errWeeks,TODAY_IDX);
}

function switchChartMetric(metric, btnEl) {
  _ftMetric = metric;
  document.querySelectorAll('.ft-metric-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));

  if (titleEl) titleEl.innerHTML = conf.title;
  if (subEl)   subEl.innerHTML   = conf.sub;
  updateForecastTrendChart();
}

// =========================================================
// FISCAL WEEK × LOB CHART — STATIC (no filter dependency)
// =========================================================
const LOB_NAMES   = ['PowerEdge','APEX','VXRAIL','POWERFLEX','AVAMAR'];
const LOB_COLORS  = { PowerEdge:'#3a6ef0', APEX:'#16a34a', VXRAIL:'#d97706', POWERFLEX:'#7c3aed', AVAMAR:'#0891b2' };
const FW_LABELS   = Array.from({length:52}, (_,i) => 'W'+String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'));

const LOB_WEEKLY_DATA = (() => {
  function seeded(s) { return () => { s=(s*16807)%2147483647; return (s-1)/2147483646; }; }
  const N = 52;
  const bases = { PowerEdge:{sr:2700,asuX:14,dspX:0.44}, APEX:{sr:1100,asuX:18,dspX:0.38},
                  VXRAIL:{sr:780,asuX:12,dspX:0.50}, POWERFLEX:{sr:440,asuX:10,dspX:0.34}, AVAMAR:{sr:290,asuX:8,dspX:0.42} };
  const seeds = { PowerEdge:11, APEX:22, VXRAIL:33, POWERFLEX:44, AVAMAR:55 };
  const result = { sr:{}, asu:{}, dispatch:{} };

  LOB_NAMES.forEach(lob => {
    const r = seeded(seeds[lob]);
    const b = bases[lob];
    const sr = Array.from({length:N}, (_, i) => {
      const seasonal = 1 + 0.22 * Math.sin((i - 8) / N * 2 * Math.PI);
      return Math.max(50, Math.round(b.sr * seasonal + (r() - 0.5) * b.sr * 0.28));
    });
    result.sr[lob]       = sr;
    result.asu[lob]      = sr.map(v => Math.round(v * b.asuX * (0.88 + r() * 0.24)));
    result.dispatch[lob] = sr.map(v => Math.round(v * b.dspX * (0.88 + r() * 0.24)));
  });
  return result;
})();

let _lobMetric = 'sr';

function initLOBWeeklyChart() {
  const el = document.getElementById('fa-chart-lob-weekly');
  if (!el) return;
  if (chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly']) {
    chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'].destroy();
    delete chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  }
  chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'] = new Chart(el, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: FW_LABELS,
      datasets: LOB_NAMES.map(lob => ({
        label: lob,
        data: LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[_lobMetric][lob],
        borderColor: LOB_COLORS[lob],
        backgroundColor: 'transparent',
        borderWidth: 1.6,
        tension: 0.3,
        pointRadius: 0,
        pointHoverRadius: 4,
        spanGaps: true
      }))
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
      plugins: {
        legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: {
          backgroundColor: '#fff', borderColor: '#dde2f4', borderWidth: 1,
          titleColor: '#5a6280', bodyColor: '#0d1020', padding: 8,
          callbacks: {
            title: ctx => 'FW · ' + ctx[0].label,
            label: ctx => ' ' + ctx.dataset.label + ': ' + ctx.raw.toLocaleString('en-IN')
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { grid:{display:false}, ticks:{color:axisColor(), font:{size:8.5}, maxTicksLimit:13,
               callback(v,i){ return i%4===0 ? FW_LABELS[i] : ''; }} },
        y: { grid:{color:gridColor()}, min:0, ticks:{color:axisColor(), font:{size:8.5},
               callback: v => v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':v>=1e3?(v/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':v} }
      }
    }
  });
}

function switchLOBMetric(metric, btnEl) {
  _lobMetric = metric;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lob-metric-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('active');
  const c = chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  if (!c) return;
  LOB_NAMES.forEach((lob, i) => { c.data.datasets[i].data = LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[metric][lob]; });
  c.update('none');
}

function updateLOBWeeklyChart() {
  const c = chartInstances['fa-chart-lob-weekly'];
  if (!c) return;
  const f = getActiveFilters();
  const weekEmpty = f.week !== undefined && f.week.length === 0;
  if (weekEmpty) {
    c.data.labels = [];
    c.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.data = []; });
  } else {
    c.data.labels = FW_LABELS;
    LOB_NAMES.forEach((lob, i) => { c.data.datasets[i].data = LOB_WEEKLY_DATA[_lobMetric][lob]; });
  }
  c.update('none');
}

function toggleCVTooltip(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  const box = document.getElementById('cv-tooltip-box');
  if (!box) return;
  const isVisible = box.style.display !== 'none';
  box.style.display = isVisible ? 'none' : 'block';
  if (!isVisible) {
    // Close on next outside click
    const close = ev => { if (!box.contains(ev.target)) { box.style.display='none'; document.removeEventListener('click', close); } };
    setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', close), 0);
  }
}

const Q_WEEKS = {
  Q1: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 1),
  Q2: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 14),
  Q3: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 27),

};

  M1: [1,2,3,4], M2: [5,6,7,8], M3: [9,10,11,12,13],
  M4: [14,15,16,17], M5: [18,19,20,21,22], M6: [23,24,25,26],
};
const FY_SCALE = { FY25: 0.92, FY26: 1.0, FY27: 1.08 };

function _makeTrend(base, amp, phase) {
  return Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) =>
    Math.max(10, Math.round(base + amp * Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * (i + (phase || 0)) / 13)))
  );
}
const TREND_DATA_52 = {
  'fa-asu':          _makeTrend(140,  20, 0),
  'fa-wo':           _makeTrend(90,   12, 0),
  'dp-ov-fs':        _makeTrend(540,  60, 0),

};

function getSelectedWeekIndices() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  let idx = Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) => i);
  if (active.quarter !== undefined) {
    if (active.quarter.length === 0) return [];
    const qNums = active.quarter.flatMap(q => Q_WEEKS[q] || []);
    idx = idx.filter(i => qNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.month !== undefined) {
    if (active.month.length === 0) return [];
    const mNums = active.month.flatMap(m => M_WEEKS[m] || []);
    if (mNums.length) idx = idx.filter(i => mNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.week !== undefined) {
    if (active.week.length === 0) return [];
    const wNums = active.week.map(w => parseInt(w.slice(1)));
    idx = idx.filter(i => wNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  return idx;
}

function getActiveFYMultiplier() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const fys = active.fy;
  if (fys === undefined) return (FY_SCALE.FY26 + FY_SCALE.FY27) / 2;
  if (fys.length === 0)  return 0;
  return fys.reduce((s, f) => s + (FY_SCALE[f] || 1.0), 0) / fys.length;
}

// Maps Quarter/Month filter selections to indices 0-11 of a 12-month (Feb–Jan) data array
const AP_MONTHS = ['Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan'];
const Q_MONTH_IDX = { Q1:[0,1,2], Q2:[3,4,5], Q3:[6,7,8], Q4:[9,10,11] };
const M_LABEL_IDX = { M1:0, M2:1, M3:2, M4:3, M5:4, M6:5 };

function getSelectedFiscalMonthIndices() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  let idx = Array.from({length: 12}, (_, i) => i);
  if (active.quarter !== undefined) {
    if (active.quarter.length === 0) return [];
    const qIdx = active.quarter.flatMap(q => Q_MONTH_IDX[q] || []);
    idx = idx.filter(i => qIdx.includes(i));
  }
  if (active.month !== undefined) {
    if (active.month.length === 0) return [];
    const mIdx = active.month.map(m => M_LABEL_IDX[m]).filter(i => i !== undefined);
    if (mIdx.length > 0) idx = idx.filter(i => mIdx.includes(i));
  }
  return idx;
}

// FILTER-AWARE CHART UPDATE FUNCTIONS
// =========================================================

// Returns true if ANY filter group has zero items selected (nothing to show)
function shouldHideAll() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  if (getActiveFYMultiplier() === 0) return true;
  if (active.quarter !== undefined && active.quarter.length === 0) return true;
  if (active.month   !== undefined && active.month.length   === 0) return true;
  if (active.region  !== undefined && active.region.length  === 0) return true;
  return false;
}

// Returns which of the 4 quarters to render based on the quarter filter
function getSelectedQuarters() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const allQ = ['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'];
  return active.quarter === undefined ? allQ : allQ.filter(q => active.quarter.includes(q));
}

function _filterByRegion(data) {
  const r = getActiveFilters().region;
  if (r === undefined) return data;
  return data.filter(d => r.includes(d.region));
}

function updateFARegionChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-hbar'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const mult = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const r    = getActiveFilters().region;
  const allR = ['AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
  const regions = r === undefined ? allR : allR.filter(x => r.includes(x));
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  chart.data.labels = hideAll ? [] : regions;
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = hideAll ? [] : regions.map(x => Math.round(FA_REGION_BASE[x].actuals  * mult));
  chart.data.datasets[1].data = hideAll ? [] : regions.map(x => Math.round(FA_REGION_BASE[x].forecast * mult));
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

function updateFAPartnerChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-partner'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll();
  const filtered = hideAll ? [] : FA_PARTNER_BASE;
  chart.data.labels = filtered.map(x => x.name);
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = filtered.map(x => x.mdr);
  chart.data.datasets[0].backgroundColor = filtered.map(x => x.color);
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

function updateFAOverviewChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-overview'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const mult = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const idx  = getSelectedWeekIndices();
  const hideAll = shouldHideAll() || idx.length === 0;
  chart.data.labels = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => `W${i + 1}`);
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => Math.round(TREND_DATA_52['fa-asu'][i] * mult));
  chart.data.datasets[1].data = hideAll ? [] : idx.map(i => Math.round(TREND_DATA_52['fa-wo'][i]  * mult));
  chart.data.datasets.forEach(ds => { ds.hidden = hideAll; });
  chart.update();
}

// AOP — per current metric, per active FY, always visible
function getAOPTargetValue() {
  const targets = AOP_METRIC_TARGETS[_ftMetric] || AOP_METRIC_TARGETS.sr;
  const f   = getActiveFilters();
  const fys = f.fy;
  if (!fys || fys.length === 0) return targets.FY26;
  const avg = fys.reduce((s, fy) => s + (targets[fy] || targets.FY26), 0) / fys.length;
  return Math.round(avg);
}

const DP_LOB_SHARE = { ISG: 0.60, ESG: 0.25, HES: 0.15 };

// ISG + ESG + HES annual totals and quarterly sums per product group
const DP_TREND_PG = {
  ISG: {
    yoy: [591000,629000,665000,707000,754000],
    qoq: [170400,178800,183600,176400,189000,184800,195000,202800]
  },
  ESG: {
    yoy: [246000,262000,277000,295000,314000],
    qoq: [71000,74500,76500,73500,78750,77000,81250,84500]
  },
  HES: {
    yoy: [148000,157000,166000,177000,189000],
    qoq: [42600,44700,45900,44100,47250,46200,48750,50700]
  }
};

// Metadata for filter-aware clipping
const YOY_FULL_LABELS = ['FY22','FY23','FY24','FY25','FY26 YTD'];
const YOY_FY_TAG      = [null,   null,   null,  'FY25','FY26'];  // null = historical baseline

const QOQ_FULL_LABELS = ['Q3 FY24','Q4 FY24','Q1 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q4 FY25','Q1 FY26','Q2 FY26'];
const QOQ_FY_TAG      = ['FY24','FY24','FY25','FY25','FY25','FY25','FY26','FY26'];
const QOQ_Q_TAG       = ['Q3',  'Q4',  'Q1',  'Q2',  'Q3',  'Q4',  'Q1',  'Q2'];

function getDPLOBMult() {
  const f = getActiveFilters();
  if (!f.lob || f.lob.length === 0) return 1.0;
  return f.lob.reduce((s, pg) => s + (DP_LOB_SHARE[pg] || 0), 0);
}

function updateDPQuadrantCharts() {
  if (!_dpBaseData) return;
  const mult = getDPLOBMult() * getActiveFYMultiplier();
  ['consistent','erratic','intermittent','lumpy'].forEach(key => {
    const c = chartInstances['dp-chart-' + key];
    if (!c) return;
    c.data.datasets[0].data = _dpBaseData[key].map(v => +(v * mult).toFixed(0));
    c.update('none');
  });
}

function updateDemandTrends() {
  const f       = getActiveFilters();
  const fyMult  = getActiveFYMultiplier();
  const selPGs  = (!f.lob     || f.lob.length     === 0) ? ['ISG','ESG','HES'] : f.lob;
  const selFYs  = f.fy;      // undefined = no checkbox group; [] = all unchecked; ['FY26'] = specific
  const selQs   = f.quarter; // undefined = no checkbox group; [] = all unchecked; ['Q1'] = specific

  // Helper — apply a clipped slice to a chart
  const applySlice = (chartKey, fullLabels, visIdx, fullSumD) => {
    const c = chartInstances['dp-trend-' + chartKey];
    if (!c) return;
    if (visIdx.length === 0) {
      c.data.labels = []; c.data.datasets[0].data = []; c.data.datasets[1].data = [];
      c.update('none'); return;
    }
    const visLabels = visIdx.map(i => fullLabels[i]);
    const visData   = visIdx.map(i => +(fullSumD[i] * fyMult).toFixed(0));
    const visPct    = visData.map((v, j) =>
      j === 0 ? null : +((v - visData[j-1]) / visData[j-1] * 100).toFixed(1));
    c.data.labels = visLabels;
    c.data.datasets[0].data = visData;
    c.data.datasets[0].backgroundColor = visData.map((_, j) =>
      visPct[j] === null ? 'rgba(144,153,190,0.45)' :
      visPct[j] >= 0     ? 'rgba(22,163,74,0.75)' : 'rgba(220,38,38,0.72)');
    c.data.datasets[1].data = visPct;
    c.update('none');
  };

  // Pre-compute full PG sums (unscaled — fyMult applied inside applySlice)
  const yoySumD = new Array(YOY_FULL_LABELS.length).fill(0);
  const qoqSumD = new Array(QOQ_FULL_LABELS.length).fill(0);
  selPGs.forEach(pg => {
    if (!DP_TREND_PG[pg]) return;
    DP_TREND_PG[pg].yoy.forEach((v, i) => { yoySumD[i] += v; });
    DP_TREND_PG[pg].qoq.forEach((v, i) => { qoqSumD[i] += v; });
  });

  const noFYFilter = !selFYs || selFYs.length === 0;
  const allFYs     = !selFYs || selFYs.length === 3; // all 3 options ticked = show historical context too

  // ── YoY: filter by FY; quarter doesn't apply to annual data ──────────────
  const yoyIdx = noFYFilter
    ? [] // no FY selected → nothing
    : YOY_FY_TAG.map((tag, i) => {
        if (tag === null) return allFYs ? i : -1;  // historical (FY22-24) only when all FYs on
        return selFYs.includes(tag) ? i : -1;
      }).filter(i => i >= 0);
  applySlice('yoy', YOY_FULL_LABELS, yoyIdx, yoySumD);

  // ── QoQ: filter by FY AND Quarter ────────────────────────────────────────
  const noQFilter = !selQs || selQs.length === 0;
  const qoqIdx = (noFYFilter || noQFilter)
    ? []
    : QOQ_FY_TAG.map((fy, i) => {
        const fyOk = fy === 'FY24'
          ? allFYs                       // FY24 historical only when all FYs selected
          : selFYs.includes(fy);
        const qOk  = selQs.includes(QOQ_Q_TAG[i]);
        return (fyOk && qOk) ? i : -1;
      }).filter(i => i >= 0);
  applySlice('qoq', QOQ_FULL_LABELS, qoqIdx, qoqSumD);
}

function resetPageFilters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="fy"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'FY26');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="quarter"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'Q1');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[data-group="lob"]').forEach(cb => {
    cb.checked = (cb.value === 'All');
  });
  // Close any open filter dropdowns visually
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown-content.open').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('open'));
  updateFilterChips();
}
const resetDPFilters = resetPageFilters; // backward-compat alias

  updateDPQuadrantCharts();
  updateDemandTrends();

  updateLOBWeeklyChart();
}
